{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T03:56:19.133Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_K1EaTHP2qKEkAtiZkO6CCo7w","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: iPhone Sideload App/control1.html\n@@\n async function sendResetEmailWithFallback(email) {\n   await sendPasswordResetEmail(auth, email);\n   return { fallbackUsed: true };\n }\n \n+function generateStrongPassword(length = 16) {\n+  const groups = [\n+    \"ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ\",\n+    \"abcdefghijkmnopqrstuvwxyz\",\n+    \"23456789\",\n+    \"!@#$%*-_+=\"\n+  ];\n+  const all = groups.join(\"\");\n+  const bytes = new Uint32Array(length);\n+  crypto.getRandomValues(bytes);\n+\n+  const chars = groups.map((group, index) => group[bytes[index] % group.length]);\n+  for (let index = chars.length; index < length; index += 1) {\n+    chars.push(all[bytes[index] % all.length]);\n+  }\n+\n+  for (let index = chars.length - 1; index > 0; index -= 1) {\n+    const swapIndex = bytes[index] % (index + 1);\n+    [chars[index], chars[swapIndex]] = [chars[swapIndex], chars[index]];\n+  }\n+\n+  return chars.join(\"\");\n+}\n+\n+async function copyTextToClipboard(text) {\n+  if (!text) return false;\n+  try {\n+    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);\n+    return true;\n+  } catch {\n+    const input = document.createElement(\"textarea\");\n+    input.value = text;\n+    input.setAttribute(\"readonly\", \"\");\n+    input.style.position = \"fixed\";\n+    input.style.left = \"-9999px\";\n+    document.body.appendChild(input);\n+    input.select();\n+    const copied = document.execCommand(\"copy\");\n+    input.remove();\n+    return copied;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function ensureGeneratedPassword() {\n+  const existing = String(dom.generatedPasswordInput?.value || \"\");\n+  if (existing) return existing;\n+  const generated = generateStrongPassword();\n+  if (dom.generatedPasswordInput) dom.generatedPasswordInput.value = generated;\n+  return generated;\n+}\n+\n+async function createPasswordResetRequest(email, source = \"login\") {\n+  const normalizedEmail = String(email || \"\").trim().toLowerCase();\n+  if (!isLikelyEmail(normalizedEmail)) {\n+    throw new Error(\"Enter a valid email address first.\");\n+  }\n+\n+  await addDoc(collection(db, \"contactMessages\"), {\n+    type: \"password_reset_request\",\n+    name: normalizedEmail,\n+    email: normalizedEmail,\n+    purpose: \"Password Reset\",\n+    subject: \"Password reset request\",\n+    message: `${normalizedEmail} requested password help from ${source}.`,\n+    source,\n+    status: \"open\",\n+    userId: currentUserUid || \"\",\n+    userEmail: currentUserEmail || normalizedEmail,\n+    createdAt: serverTimestamp(),\n+    createdAtMs: Date.now(),\n+    read: false\n+  });\n+}\n+\n function mapActionTypeLabel(type) {\n*** End Patch\n"}}

App\\control1.html' | Select-Object -Index (6600..6685)"}],"source":"agent","stdout":"","stderr":"","aggregated_output":"function renderHistoryList() {\r\n  renderHistoryStats();\r\n\r\n  const search = String(dom.historySearch.value || \"\").trim().toLowerCase();\r\n  const requestedType = String(dom.historyType.value || \"all\");\r\n  const sortMode = String(dom.historySort.value || \"newest\");\r\n  const limitCount = Number.parseInt(dom.historyLimit.value || \"12\", 10) || 12;\r\n  const { startMs, endMs } = resolveDateRange();\r\n\r\n  const combined = [...auditEntries, ...buildVirtualPendingEntries()];\r\n\r\n  let entries = combined.filter(entry => {\r\n    const stamp = Number(entry.createdAtMs || 0);\r\n    if (stamp < startMs || stamp > endMs) return false;\r\n    if (requestedType !== \"all\") {\r\n      if (requestedType === \"applied\" && String(entry.status || \"applied\") !== \"applied\") return false;\r\n      if (requestedType === \"proposal\" && String(entry.status || \"\") !== \"proposal\") return false;\r\n      if (![\"applied\", \"proposal\"].includes(requestedType) && entry.type !== requestedType) return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (!search) return true;\r\n    const haystack = `${entry.summary || \"\"} ${entry.actorEmail || \"\"} ${(entry.context?.pathLabel || \"\")}`.toLowerCase();\r\n    return haystack.includes(search);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  if (sortMode === \"oldest\") {\r\n    entries.sort((a, b) => Number(a.createdAtMs || 0) - Number(b.createdAtMs || 0));\r\n  } else if (sortMode === \"largest\") {\r\n    entries.sort((a, b) => changeMagnitude(b.changes || {}) - changeMagnitude(a.changes || {}));\r\n  } else {\r\n    entries.sort((a, b) => Number(b.createdAtMs || 0) - Number(a.createdAtMs || 0));\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  entries = entries.slice(0, limitCount);\r\n\r\n  if (!entries.length) {\r\n    dom.historyList.innerHTML = '<li class=\"log-empty\">No activity entries match current filters.</li>';\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  dom.historyList.innerHTML = entries.map(entry => {\r\n    const changes = entry.changes || {};\r\n    const chips = `\r\n      <span class=\"history-delta-chip ${Number(changes.red || 0) > 0 ? \"delta-pos\" : (Number(changes.red || 0) < 0 ? \"delta-neg\" : \"\")}\">R ${Number(changes.red || 0) > 0 ? \"+\" : \"\"}${Number(changes.red || 0)}</span>\r\n      <span class=\"history-delta-chip ${Number(changes.white || 0) > 0 ? \"delta-pos\" : (Number(changes.white || 0) < 0 ? \"delta-neg\" : \"\")}\">W ${Number(changes.white || 0) > 0 ? \"+\" : \"\"}${Number(changes.white || 0)}</span>\r\n      <span class=\"history-delta-chip ${Number(changes.blue || 0) > 0 ? \"delta-pos\" : (Number(changes.blue || 0) < 0 ? \"delta-neg\" : \"\")}\">B ${Number(changes.blue || 0) > 0 ? \"+\" : \"\"}${Number(changes.blue || 0)}</span>\r\n      <span class=\"history-delta-chip ${Number(changes.silver || 0) > 0 ? \"delta-pos\" : (Number(changes.silver || 0) < 0 ? \"delta-neg\" : \"\")}\">S ${Number(changes.silver || 0) > 0 ? \"+\" : \"\"}${Number(changes.silver || 0)}</span>\r\n    `;\r\n\r\n    const contextText = entry.context?.pathLabel || (entry.context\r\n      ? `${entry.context.categoryName} > ${entry.context.eventName} > ${entry.context.subeventName}`\r\n      : \"No path\");\r\n\r\n    const highlightClass = highlightEntryId && highlightEntryId === entry.id ? \" history-subitem\" : \"\";\r\n\r\n    return `\r\n      <li class=\"history-item${highlightClass}\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <div class=\"history-row-top\">\r\n            <span class=\"history-type\">${mapActionTypeLabel(entry.type)}</span>\r\n            <span>${entry.summary || \"Untitled action\"}</span>\r\n          </div>\r\n          <div class=\"history-meta\">${new Date(Number(entry.createdAtMs || Date.now())).toLocaleString()} Â· ${entry.actorEmail || \"unknown\"} Â· ${contextText}</div>\r\n          <div class=\"history-delta-strip\">${chips}</div>\r\n          ${entry.notes ? `<div class=\"history-meta\">Notes: ${entry.notes}</div>` : \"\"}\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div class=\"history-item-actions\">\r\n          ${entry.type === \"savepoint\" && can(\"restoreHistory\") ? `<button class=\"btn btn-outline btn-mini\" type=\"button\" data-restore-savepoint=\"${entry.id}\">Restore</button>` : \"\"}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </li>\r\n    `;\r\n  }).join(\"\");\r\n\r\n  highlightEntryId = \"\";\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderActivityList() {\r\n  const entries = [...auditEntries]\r\n    .sort((a, b) => Number(b.createdAtMs || 0) - Number(a.createdAtMs || 0))\r\n    .slice(0, MAX_ACTIVITY_PREVIEW);\r\n\r\n  if seconds\nOutput:\nfunction renderHistoryList() {\r\n  renderHistoryStats();\r\n\r\n  const search = String(dom.historySearch.value || \"\").trim().toLowerCase();\r\n  const requestedType = String(dom.historyType.value || \"all\");\r\n  const sortMode = String(dom.historySort.value || \"newest\");\r\n  const limitCount = Number.parseInt(dom.historyLimit.value || \"12\", 10) || 12;\r\n  const { startMs, endMs } = resolveDateRange();\r\n\r\n  const combined = [...auditEntries, ...buildVirtualPendingEntries()];\r\n\r\n  let entries = combined.filter(entry => {\r\n    const stamp = Number(entry.createdAtMs || 0);\r\n    if (stamp < startMs || stamp > endMs) return false;\r\n    if (requestedType !== \"all\") {\r\n      if (requestedType === \"applied\" && String(entry.status || \"applied\") !== \"applied\") return false;\r\n      if (requestedType === \"proposal\" && String(entry.status || \"\") !== \"proposal\") return false;\r\n      if (![\"applied\", \"proposal\"].includes(requestedType) && entry.type !== requestedType) return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (!search) return true;\r\n    const haystack = `${entry.summary || \"\"} ${entry.actorEmail || \"\"} ${(entry.context?.pathLabel || \"\")}`.toLowerCase();\r\n    return haystack.includes(search);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  if (sortMode === \"oldest\") {\r\n    entries.sort((a, b) => Number(a.createdAtMs || 0) - Number(b.createdAtMs || 0));\r\n  } else if (sortMode === \"largest\") {\r\n    entries.sort((a, b) => changeMagnitude(b.changes || {}) - changeMagnitude(a.changes || {}));\r\n  } else {\r\n    entries.sort((a, b) => Number(b.createdAtMs || 0) - Number(a.createdAtMs || 0));\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  entries = entries.slice(0, limitCount);\r\n\r\n  if (!entries.length) {\r\n    dom.historyList.innerHTML = '<li class=\"log-empty\">No activity entries match current filters.</li>';\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  dom.historyList.innerHTML = entries.map(entry => {\r\n    const changes = entry.changes || {};\r\n    const chips = `\r\n      <span class=\"history-delta-chip ${Number(changes.red || 0) > 0 ? \"delta-pos\" : (Number(changes.red || 0) < 0 ? \"delta-neg\" : \"\")}\">R ${Number(changes.red || 0) > 0 ? \"+\" : \"\"}${Number(changes.red || 0)}</span>\r\n      <span class=\"history-delta-chip ${Number(changes.white || 0) > 0 ? \"delta-pos\" : (Number(changes.white || 0) < 0 ? \"delta-neg\" : \"\")}\">W ${Number(changes.white || 0) > 0 ? \"+\" : \"\"}${Number(changes.white || 0)}</span>\r\n      <span class=\"history-delta-chip ${Number(changes.blue || 0) > 0 ? \"delta-pos\" : (Number(changes.blue || 0) < 0 ? \"delta-neg\" : \"\")}\">B ${Number(changes.blue || 0) > 0 ? \"+\" : \"\"}${Number(changes.blue || 0)}</span>\r\n      <span class=\"history-delta-chip ${Number(changes.silver || 0) > 0 ? \"delta-pos\" : (Number(changes.silver || 0) < 0 ? \"delta-neg\" : \"\")}\">S ${Number(changes.silver || 0) > 0 ? \"+\" : \"\"}${Number(changes.silver || 0)}</span>\r\n    `;\r\n\r\n    const contextText = entry.context?.pathLabel || (entry.context\r\n      ? `${entry.context.categoryName} > ${entry.context.eventName} > ${entry.context.subeventName}`\r\n      : \"No path\");\r\n\r\n    const highlightClass = highlightEntryId && highlightEntryId === entry.id ? \" history-subitem\" : \"\";\r\n\r\n    return `\r\n      <li class=\"history-item${highlightClass}\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <div class=\"history-row-top\">\r\n            <span class=\"history-type\">${mapActionTypeLabel(entry.type)}</span>\r\n            <span>${entry.summary || \"Untitled action\"}</span>\r\n          </div>\r\n          <div class=\"history-meta\">${new Date(Number(entry.createdAtMs || Date.now())).toLocaleString()} Â· ${entry.actorEmail || \"unknown\"} Â· ${contextText}</div>\r\n          <div class=\"history-delta-strip\">${chips}</div>\r\n          ${entry.notes ? `<div class=\"history-meta\">Notes: ${entry.notes}</div>` : \"\"}\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div class=\"history-item-actions\">\r\n          ${entry.type === \"savepoint\" && can(\"restoreHistory\") ? `<button class=\"btn btn-outline btn-mini\" type=\"button\" data-restore-savepoint=\"${entry.id}\">Restore</button>` : \"\"}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </li>\r\n    `;\r\n  }).join(\"\");\r\n\r\n  highlightEntryId = \"\";\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderActivityList() {\r\n  const entries = [...auditEntries]\r\n    .sort((a, b) => Number(b.createdAtMs || 0) - Number(a.createdAtMs || 0))\r\n    .slice(0, MAX_ACTIVITY_PREVIEW);\r\n\r\n  if (!entries.length) {\r\n    dom.activityList.innerHTML = '<li class=\"log-empty\">No activity yet this session</li>';\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T03:56:41.584Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_9NDw0vRtqK6LAdqvopavmdyy","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: iPhone Sideload App/control1.html\n@@\n async function refreshUserList() {\n   if (!can(\"manageUsers\") || TEST_MODE) {\n     userProfiles = [];\n     renderUserList();\n     return;\n@@\n     showToast(\"Failed to load users list.\", \"warn\");\n   }\n }\n \n+async function refreshPasswordResetRequests() {\n+  if (TEST_MODE || currentRole !== \"superadmin\") {\n+    passwordResetRequests = [];\n+    renderPasswordResetRequests();\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  try {\n+    const snapshot = await getDocs(query(collection(db, \"contactMessages\"), orderBy(\"createdAtMs\", \"desc\"), limit(100)));\n+    passwordResetRequests = snapshot.docs\n+      .map(docSnap => ({ id: docSnap.id, ...docSnap.data() }))\n+      .filter(item => item.type === \"password_reset_request\" || item.purpose === \"Password Reset\");\n+    renderPasswordResetRequests();\n+  } catch (error) {\n+    console.error(error);\n+    showToast(\"Failed to load reset requests.\", \"warn\");\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+async function closePasswordResetRequest(requestId) {\n+  if (TEST_MODE || currentRole !== \"superadmin\") return;\n+  const request = passwordResetRequests.find(item => item.id === requestId);\n+  if (!request) return;\n+\n+  try {\n+    await updateDoc(doc(db, \"contactMessages\", requestId), {\n+      status: \"closed\",\n+      read: true,\n+      handledBy: currentUserEmail,\n+      handledAt: serverTimestamp(),\n+      handledAtMs: Date.now()\n+    });\n+    passwordResetRequests = passwordResetRequests.map(item => (\n+      item.id === requestId ? { ...item, status: \"closed\" } : item\n+    ));\n+    renderPasswordResetRequests();\n+    showToast(\"Reset request marked done.\", \"success\");\n+  } catch (error) {\n+    console.error(error);\n+    showToast(\"Could not close reset request.\", \"warn\");\n+  }\n+}\n+\n async function writeBackupPayload(backupRef, subcollectionName, rows) {\n*** End Patch\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T03:57:31.196Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_L3hU8SCjUr3rtrFwGoMysB1Q","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.9 seconds\nOutput:\n    console.error(error);\r\n    setSyncStatus(\"Disconnected from live scores.\", \"warn\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  unsubAudit = onSnapshot(\r\n    query(collection(scoresDoc, \"auditLog\"), orderBy(\"createdAtMs\", \"desc\"), limit(MAX_ACTIVITY_ENTRIES)),\r\n    snapshot => {\r\n      auditEntries = snapshot.docs.map(docSnap => ({ id: docSnap.id, ...docSnap.data() }));\r\n      renderReasonTracker();\r\n      renderHistoryList();\r\n      renderActivityList();\r\n      updateQuickStats();\r\n    },\r\n    error => {\r\n      console.error(error);\r\n      showToast(\"Failed to load activity log.\", \"warn\");\r\n    }\r\n  );\r\n\r\n  const proposalQuery = can(\"approveProposals\")\r\n    ? query(collection(scoresDoc, \"pendingProposals\"), orderBy(\"createdAtMs\", \"desc\"), limit(200))\r\n    : query(collection(scoresDoc, \"pendingProposals\"), where(\"createdByUid\", \"==\", currentUserUid), orderBy(\"createdAtMs\", \"desc\"), limit(200));\r\n\r\n  unsubProposals = onSnapshot(proposalQuery, snapshot => {\r\n    pendingProposals = snapshot.docs.map(docSnap => ({ id: docSnap.id, ...docSnap.data() }));\r\n    renderProposalList();\r\n    renderHistoryStats();\r\n  }, error => {\r\n    console.error(error);\r\n    showToast(\"Failed to load proposal queue.\", \"warn\");\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Simple HTML escaping utility\r\nfunction escapeHtml(text) {\r\n  const map = {\r\n    '&': '&amp;',\r\n    '<': '&lt;',\r\n    '>': '&gt;',\r\n    '\"': '&quot;',\r\n    \"'\": '&#039;'\r\n  };\r\n  return String(text || \"\").replace(/[&<>\"']/g, ch => map[ch]);\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ============================================================================\r\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T03:57:47.086Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_Q3cIiAXFeG9HJcQStDRcneZl","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: iPhone Sideload App/control1.html\n@@\n   const write = await withWrite(async () => {\n     let uid = \"\";\n     let createdAuth = false;\n+    let existingAuthPasswordSkipped = false;\n \n     if (password) {\n       try {\n         uid = await createAuthUserWithoutSwitchingSession({ email, password, name });\n         createdAuth = true;\n       } catch (error) {\n         if (error?.code !== \"auth/email-already-in-use\") {\n           throw error;\n         }\n+        existingAuthPasswordSkipped = true;\n       }\n     }\n@@\n \n     dom.userPasswordInput.value = \"\";\n-    setUserAdminStatus(createdAuth ? `Created user ${email} (${role}).` : `Updated user ${email} (${role}).`);\n+    if (existingAuthPasswordSkipped) {\n+      setUserAdminStatus(`Updated ${email} (${role}). Existing Auth passwords cannot be changed from this browser; send a reset link for that account.`);\n+    } else {\n+      setUserAdminStatus(createdAuth ? `Created user ${email} (${role}).` : `Updated user ${email} (${role}).`);\n+    }\n     showToast(createdAuth ? \"User created.\" : \"User updated.\", \"success\");\n*** End Patch\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T03:57:51.793Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"I’m tightening the behavior so it won’t imply something Firebase can’t do: if a superadmin types a password for an already-existing Auth account, the app now says the profile was updated but the Auth password was not changed, and points them to the reset-link path. That keeps the helper UI useful without creating a false “manual reset worked” moment.","phase":"commentary","memory_citation":null}}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T03:57:51.793Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"I’m tightening the behavior so it won’t imply something Firebase can’t do: if a superadmin types a password for an already-existing Auth account, the app now says the profile was updated but the Auth password was not changed, and points them to the reset-link path. That keeps the helper UI useful without creating a false “manual reset worked” moment."}],"phase":"commentary"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T03:58:51.656Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_d1uMC930LF8EuRWfPSfBXJrk","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: SETUP.md\n@@\n User creation stays inside the app.\n \n 1. Open the full iPhone/control app.\n 2. Sign in as a `superadmin`.\n 3. Open `Admin Management`.\n 4. Use `Account Management`.\n 5. Enter name, email, temporary password, and role.\n 6. Click `Create / Update User`.\n \n This creates the Firebase Auth user and writes/updates `userProfiles/{uid}`.\n+\n+Password help uses the same superadmin flow. Signed-out users click `Forgot Password?`, which creates a superadmin-visible request in `contactMessages`. In `Admin Management`, superadmins can load requests, send Firebase reset links, generate strong temporary passwords for new users, copy them to the clipboard, and mark requests done. Existing Firebase Auth passwords cannot be directly changed from the browser client; use a reset link for existing accounts.\n*** End Patch\n"}}

https://firebaserules.googleapis.com/v1/projects/ala-house-leaderboard/rulesets {\"name\":\"projects/ala-house-leaderboard/rulesets/bae2c1c9-48f3-4702-91d8-064b6b926286\",\"source\":{\"files\":[{\"content\":\"rules_version = '2';\\n\\nservice cloud.firestore {\\n  match /databases/{database}/documents {\\n    function signedIn() {\\n      return request.auth != null;\\n    }\\n\\n    function profile() {\\n      return signedIn()\\n        ? get(/databases/$(database)/documents/userProfiles/$(request.auth.uid)).data\\n        : {};\\n    }\\n\\n    function role() {\\n      return signedIn()\\n        ? (\\n            request.auth.token.role != null\\n              ? (\\n                  request.auth.token.role == \\\"staff\\\" || request.auth.token.role == \\\"helper\\\"\\n                    ? \\\"member\\\"\\n                    : request.auth.token.role\\n                )\\n              : (\\n                  request.auth.token.superadmin == true\\n                    ? \\\"superadmin\\\"\\n                    : (\\n                        request.auth.token.admin == true\\n                          ? \\\"admin\\\"\\n                          : (\\n                              profile().role == \\\"staff\\\" || profile().role == \\\"helper\\\"\\n                                ? \\\"member\\\"\\n                                : profile().role\\n                            )\\n                      )\\n                )\\n          )\\n        : \\\"\\\";\\n    }\\n\\n    function hasRole(roles) {\\n      return signedIn() && role() in roles;\\n    }\\n\\n    function can(permission) {\\n      return signedIn() && (\\n        (role() == \\\"viewer\\\" && permission == \\\"proposePoints\\\") ||\\n        (role() != \\\"viewer\\\" && (\\n          role() == \\\"superadmin\\\" ||\\n          profile().get(\\\"permissions\\\", {}).get(permission, false) == true ||\\n          (\\n            permission in [\\\"scoreEdit\\\", \\\"placeAwards\\\", \\\"studentLookup\\\", \\\"historyAccess\\\", \\\"checkpoint\\\"] &&\\n            role() in [\\\"admin\\\", \\\"member\\\"]\\n          ) ||\\n          (\\n            permission in [\\\"approveProposals\\\", \\\"downloadBackup\\\"] &&\\n            role() == \\\"admin\\\"\\n          ) ||\\n          (\\n            permission == \\\"proposePoints\\\" &&\\n            role() == \\\"admin\\\"\\n          )\\n        ))\\n      );\\n    }\\n\\n    function isOwner(uid) {\\n      return signedIn() && request.auth.uid == uid;\\n    }\\n\\n    match /leaderboard/{docId} {\\n      allow read: if docId == \\\"scores\\\" || can(\\\"historyAccess\\\");\\n      allow create, update: if can(\\\"scoreEdit\\\") || can(\\\"approveProposals\\\") || can(\\\"checkpoint\\\");\\n      allow delete: if role() == \\\"superadmin\\\";\\n\\n      match /auditLog/{auditId} {\\n        allow read: if can(\\\"historyAccess\\\");\\n        allow create: if can(\\\"scoreEdit\\\") || can(\\\"proposePoints\\\") || can(\\\"approveProposals\\\");\\n        allow update, delete: if false;\\n      }\\n\\n      match /pendingProposals/{proposalId} {\\n        allow read: if can(\\\"approveProposals\\\") || resource.data.createdByUid == request.auth.uid;\\n        allow create: if can(\\\"proposePoints\\\") || can(\\\"scoreEdit\\\");\\n        allow update: if can(\\\"approveProposals\\\");\\n        allow delete: if can(\\\"approveProposals\\\");\\n      }\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    match /userProfiles/{uid} {\\n      allow read: if isOwner(uid) || hasRole([\\\"superadmin\\\", \\\"admin\\\", \\\"member\\\"]);\\n      allow create, update: if role() == \\\"superadmin\\\" || can(\\\"manageUsers\\\");\\n      allow delete: if role() == \\\"superadmin\\\";\\n    }\\n\\n    match /studentDirectory/{studentId} {\\n      allow read: if can(\\\"studentLookup\\\");\\n      allow create, update, delete: if role() == \\\"superadmin\\\" || can(\\\"manageUsers\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    match /eventTags/{tagId} {\\n      allow read: if signedIn();\\n      allow create, update: if can(\\\"manageCatalog\\\") || can(\\\"approveProposals\\\");\\n      allow delete: if role() == \\\"superadmin\\\";\\n    }\\n\\n    match /eventTagProposals/{proposalId} {\\n      allow read, create: if signedIn();\\n      allow update, delete: if can(\\\"manageCatalog\\\") || can(\\\"approveProposals\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    match /contactMessages/{messageId} {\\n      allow create: if signedIn() || (\\n        request.resource.data.type == \\\"password_reset_request\\\" &&\\n        request.resource.data.email is string &&\\n        request.resource.data.email.size() <= 254\\n      );\\n      allow read, update, delete: if role() == \\\"superadmin\\\" || can(\\\"manageUsers\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    match /systemBackups/{backupId} {\\n      allow read, create, update, delete: if role() == \\\"superadmin\\\";\\n\\n      match /{subcollection}/{docId} {\\n        allow read, write: if role() == \\\"superadmin\\\";\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    match /{document=**} {\\n      allow read, write: if false;\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"name\":\"firestore.rules\"}]},\"createTime\":\"2026-04-30T03:59:33.764559Z\",\"metadata\":{\"services\":[\"cloud.firestore\"]}}\r\n[2026-04-30T03:59:33.385Z] [rules] created ruleset {"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:00:04.898Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"Continued and finished the superadmin password-reset flow.\n\nChanged:\n- [iPhone Sideload App/control1.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/control1.html:3443>): signed-out “Forgot Password?” now creates a superadmin-visible request instead of sending a direct reset email.\n- [iPhone Sideload App/control1.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/control1.html:3909>): added strong temporary password generation and copy-to-clipboard helpers.\n- [iPhone Sideload App/control1.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/control1.html:3973>): added reset request list/actions in superadmin Account Management.\n- [firestore.rules](/c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/firestore.rules:113): allowed signed-out password reset request creation, while keeping read/update/delete superadmin/manage-users only.\n- [SETUP.md](/c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/SETUP.md:149): documented the reset workflow and the Firebase browser-client limitation.\n\nImportant note: existing Firebase Auth passwords cannot be directly changed from this browser-only app. The UI now makes that clear and routes existing accounts to reset links; generated passwords are useful for new Auth users.\n\nVerified:\n- `npm.cmd run check`\n- embedded iPhone module syntax check for `control1.html` and generated `www/index.html`\n- regenerated `iPhone Sideload App/www/index.html`\n- deployed Firestore rules/indexes successfully to `ala-house-leaderboard`","phase":"final_answer","memory_citation":null}}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:00:04.899Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"Continued and finished the superadmin password-reset flow.\n\nChanged:\n- [iPhone Sideload App/control1.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/control1.html:3443>): signed-out “Forgot Password?” now creates a superadmin-visible request instead of sending a direct reset email.\n- [iPhone Sideload App/control1.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/control1.html:3909>): added strong temporary password generation and copy-to-clipboard helpers.\n- [iPhone Sideload App/control1.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/control1.html:3973>): added reset request list/actions in superadmin Account Management.\n- [firestore.rules](/c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/firestore.rules:113): allowed signed-out password reset request creation, while keeping read/update/delete superadmin/manage-users only.\n- [SETUP.md](/c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/SETUP.md:149): documented the reset workflow and the Firebase browser-client limitation.\n\nImportant note: existing Firebase Auth passwords cannot be directly changed from this browser-only app. The UI now makes that clear and routes existing accounts to reset links; generated passwords are useful for new Auth users.\n\nVerified:\n- `npm.cmd run check`\n- embedded iPhone module syntax check for `control1.html` and generated `www/index.html`\n- regenerated `iPhone Sideload App/www/index.html`\n- deployed Firestore rules/indexes successfully to `ala-house-leaderboard`"}],"phase":"final_answer"}}

class=\"btn btn-muted\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Undo Last Action</button>\r\n    <button id=\"redoBtn\" class=\"btn btn-muted\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Redo</button>\r\n Event</button>\r\n        <button id=\"checkpointPostBtn\" class=\"btn btn-muted\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Close Event</button>\r\n        <button id=\"undoEventActionBtn\" class=\"btn btn-outline\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Undo Last Event Action</button>\r\n        <button id=\"checkpointLegacyBtn\" class=\"btn btn-outline\" type=\"button\" data-action-control hidden>Legacy Fix</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n    <p id=\"openEventStatus\" class=\"muted\">No open event window.</p>\r\n    <p id=\"eventActionHint\" class=\"event-hint\">Start an event class=\"activity-log\">\r\n    <h4>Recent Activity</h4>\r\n    <ul id=\"activityList\"><li class=\"log-empty\">No activity yet this session</li></ul>\r\n  </section>\r\n\r\n  <section id=\"historyHelpTitle\">How to Run Event Checkpoints</h3>\r\n      <button id=\"historyHelpCloseBtn\" class=\"btn btn-outline btn-mini\" type=\"button\" data-help-close>Close</button>\r\n    </header>\r\n\r\n    <p class=\"help-lead\">Use this flow whenever you want one clean event summary while still keeping every point change.</p>\r\n\r\n    <div class=\"help-graphic\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\r\n      <div class=\"help-step-chip\">1. Start Event</div>\r\n      <div class=\"help-arrow\">â†’</div>\r\n      <div class=\"help-step-chip\">2. Add points (label each game)</div>\r\n      <div class=\"help-arrow\">â†’</div>\r\n      <div class=\"help-step-chip\">3. Close Event</div>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <ol class=\"help-list\">\r\n      <li><strong>Name the event</strong> in the checkpoint box (example: Spring Sports Assembly), then click <strong>Start Event</strong>.</li>\r\n      <li><strong>Optional:</strong> type the current game in the game/event label box (example: Tug of War). Every point action will include that label.</li>\r\n      <li>Add points normally with quick buttons, custom amounts, or place awards.</li>\r\n      <li>When the event is done, click <strong>Close Event</strong>. Youâ€™ll get one clean event summary with totals.</li>\r\n      <li>In History, click <strong>Expand</strong> on that event to see every detailed action inside it.</li>\r\n    </ol>\r\n\r\n    <div class=\"help-note\">\r\n      <strong>Already made a pre checkpoint earlier?</strong>\r\n      <p>Type that same event name and click <strong>Close Event</strong>. The system will auto-link it and build the event summary.</p>\r\n    </div>\r\n  </section>\r\n</div>\r\n\r\n<script type=\"module\" src=\"control.js\"></script>\r\n</body>\r\n</html>\r\n","exit_code":0,"duration":{"secs":0,"nanos":654866300},"formatted_output":"","status":"completed"}}

name=\"apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style\" content=\"black-translucent\" />\r\n<meta name=\"apple-mobile-web-app-title\" content=\"House Points\" />\r\n<title>House Points Control</title>\r\n<link href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap\" rel=\"stylesheet\">\r\n<style>\r\n:root {\r\n  --bg-a: #f4f6fb;\r\n  --bg-b: #d9e3ee;\r\n  --surface: #ffffff;\r\n  --surface-soft: #f6f8fd;\r\n  --surface-tint: #e8eef8;\r\n  --line: #d2dbe8;\r\n  --text: #192235;\r\n  --muted: #5f6e88;\r\n  --accent: #406ac8;\r\n  --accent-strong: #345cb3;\r\n  --danger: #cc2e3c;\r\n  --success: #1d9f5f;\r\n  --warning: #d77a21;\r\n  --radius-lg: 20px;\r\n  --radius-md: 14px;\r\n  --radius-sm: 11px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n* {\r\n  box-sizing: border-box;\r\n}\r\n\r\nhtml,\r\nbody {\r\n  width: 100%;\r\n  min-height: 100%;\r\n  margin: 0;\r\n}\r\n\r\nbody {\r\n  font-family: \"Manrope\", \"Segoe UI\", Arial, sans-serif;\r\n  color: var(--text);\r\n  background:\r\n    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 15%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82), transparent 38%),\r\n    radial-gradient(circle at 80% 8%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45), transparent 42%),\r\n    linear-gradient(160deg, var(--bg-a), var(--bg-b));\r\n}\r\n\r\n[hidden] {\r\n  display: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.login-shell {\r\n  min-height: 100dvh;\r\n  display: grid;\r\n  place-items: center;\r\n  padding: 24px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.login-card {\r\n  width: min(440px, 100%);\r\n  padding: 24px;\r\n  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);\r\n  border: 1px solid rgba(24, 32, 52, 0.12);\r\n  background: var(--surface);\r\n  box-shadow: 0 16px 45px rgba(20, 31, 53, 0.14);\r\n  display: grid;\r\n  gap: 12px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.brand {\r\n  font-size: 12px;\r\n  letter-spacing: 0.08em;\r\n  text-transform: uppercase;\r\n  color: var(--muted);\r\n  font-weight: 800;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.login-card h1 {\r\n  margin: 0;\r\n  font-size: 28px;\r\n  line-height: 1.05;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.login-subtitle {\r\n  margin: -6px 0 4px;\r\n  color: var(--muted);\r\n  font-size: 14px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.field {\r\n  display: grid;\r\n  gap: 6px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.field span {\r\n  font-size: 13px;\r\n  color: var(--muted);\r\n  font-weight: 600;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.login-meta-row {\r\n  display: flex;\r\n  align-items: center;\r\n  justify-content: space-between;\r\n  gap: 8px;\r\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\r\n}\r\n\r\ninput,\r\nselect,\r\nbutton {\r\n  font-family: inherit;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.field input,\r\n.custom-field input,\r\n.place-select,\r\n.checkpoint-row input {\r\n  border: 1px solid var(--line);\r\n  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);\r\n  padding: 10px 12px;\r\n  font-size: 14px;\r\n  color: var(--text);\r\n  background: #fff;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.field input:focus,\r\n.custom-field input:focus,\r\n.place-select:focus,\r\n.checkpoint-row input:focus {\r\n  outline: 0;\r\n  border-color: rgba(44, 98, 198, 0.62);\r\n  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(44, 98, 198, 0.18);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.auth-error {\r\n  margin: 0;\r\n  border: 1px solid rgba(204, 46, 60, 0.25);\r\n  background: rgba(204, 46, 60, 0.08);\r\n  color: #8d1f2a;\r\n  border-radius: 10px;\r\n  padding: 10px 12px;\r\n  font-size: 13px;\r\n  font-weight: 600;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.wrap {\r\n  display: none;\r\n  width: min(1200px, 100%);\r\n  margin: 0 auto;\r\n  padding: clamp(14px, 2.2vw, 30px);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.topbar {\r\n  display: flex;\r\n  justify-content: space-between;\r\n  align-items: flex-start;\r\n  gap: 14px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.topbar h2 {\r\n  margin: 0;\r\n  font-size: clamp(24px, 2.6vw, 34px);\r\n  letter-spacing: -0.01em;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.topbar-actions {\r\n  display: flex;\r\n  align-items: center;\r\n  gap: 8px;\r\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\r\n  justify-content: flex-end;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.quick-stats-card {\r\n  display: grid;\r\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));\r\n  gap: 12px;\r\n  margin: 16px 0 12px;\r\n  background: var(--surface);\r\n  border-radius: var(--radius-md);\r\n  border: 1px solid var(--line);\r\n  padding: 12px;\r\n  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(20, 31, 53, 0.06);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.stat-item {\r\n  display: flex;\r\n  flex-direction: column;\r\n  gap: 4px;\r\n  padding: 8px;\r\n  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);\r\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--surface-soft), var(--surface));\r\n  border: 1px solid var(--surface-tint);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.stat-label {\r\n  font-size: 12px;\r\n  font-weight: 600;\r\n  color: var(--muted);\r\n  text-transform: uppercase;\r\n  letter-spacing: 0.03em;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.stat-value {\r\n  font-size: 20px;\r\n  font-weight: 700;\r\n  color: var(--accent);\r\n  line-height: 1.2;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.workspace-nav {\r\n  margin-top: 12px;\r\n  display: flex;\r\n  gap: 8px;\r\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.workspace-tab {\r\n  min-height: 36px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.workspace-tab.is-active {\r\n  background: linear-gradient(rgb(233, 242, 255), rgb(221, 234, 255));\r\n  border-color: rgb(173, 200, 246);\r\n  color: rgb(29, 67, 138);\r\n}\r\n\r\n[data-workspace-panel][hidden],\r\n.workspace-hidden {\r\n  display: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.whoami {\r\n  display: grid;\r\n  text-align: right;\r\n  gap: 1px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.whoami span {\r\n  font-size: 11px;\r\n  color: var(--muted);\r\n  text-transform: uppercase;\r\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.muted {\r\n  color: var(--muted);\r\n  font-size: 13px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.sync-status {\r\n  margin: 4px 0 0;\r\n  font-size: 13px;\r\n  font-weight: 600;\r\n","exit_code":0,"duration":{"secs":1,"nanos":140454900},"formatted_output":"","status":"completed"}}

class=\"modal-notes-input\">\r\n\r\n      <!-- Save Custom Tag -->\r\n      <label class=\"custom-tag-save-label\">\r\n        <input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"saveCustomTagCheckbox\">\r\n        <span>Save tag for reuse</span>\r\n      </label>\r\n\r\n      <!-- Action Buttons -->\r\n      <div class=\"modal-actions\">\r\n        <button id=\"cancelTagModalBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\">Cancel</button>\r\n        <button id=\"applyTagsBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\">Apply & Score</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n  </div>\r\n\r\n  <!-- Email Contact Form Modal -->\r\n  <div id=\"emailContactFormModal\" class=\"email-contact-modal\" hidden>\r\n    <div class=\"email-modal-scrim\"></div>\r\n    <div class=\"email-modal-panel\">\r\n      <div class=\"email-modal-header\">\r\n        <h2>Send us a Message</h2>\r\n        <button id=\"closeEmailFormBtn\" class=\"btn-icon-close\" aria-label=\"Close form\" type=\"button\">Ã—</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      <div class=\"email-form-fields\">\r\n        <div class=\"email-form-field\">\r\n          <label for=\"emailContactPurpose\" style=\"font-weight: 600;\">What's this about?</label>\r\n          <select id=\"emailContactPurpose\" class=\"email-form-select\">\r\n            <option value=\"help\">Help & Support</option>\r\n            <option value=\"bug\">Bug Report</option>\r\n            <option value=\"feedback\">Feedback</option>\r\n            <option value=\"other\">Other</option>\r\n          </select>\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"email-form-field\">\r\n          <label for=\"emailContactName\" style=\"font-weight: 600;\">Your Name</label>\r\n          <input id=\"emailContactName\" type=\"text\" class=\"email-form-input\" placeholder=\"Your name\" maxlength=\"80\">\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"email-form-field\">\r\n          <label for=\"emailContactEmail\" style=\"font-weight: 600;\">Your Email</label>\r\n          <input id=\"emailContactEmail\" type=\"email\" class=\"email-form-input\" placeholder=\"your@email.com\" maxlength=\"100\">\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"email-form-field\">\r\n          <label for=\"emailContactSubject\" style=\"font-weight: 600;\">Subject</label>\r\n          <input id=\"emailContactSubject\" type=\"text\" class=\"email-form-input\" placeholder=\"Subject...\" maxlength=\"120\">\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"email-form-field\">\r\n          <label for=\"emailContactMessage\" style=\"font-weight: 600;\">Message</label>\r\n          <textarea id=\"emailContactMessage\" class=\"email-form-textarea\" placeholder=\"Tell us what you think...\" maxlength=\"500\" rows=\"4\"></textarea>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      <div class=\"email-form-status\" id=\"emailFormStatus\"></div>\r\n\r\n      <div class=\"email-modal-actions\">\r\n        <button id=\"cancelEmailFormBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\">Cancel</button>\r\n        <button id=\"sendEmailFormBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\">Send Message</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n  </div>\r\n\r\n  <section class=\"place-awards advanced-section\" id=\"placePanel\" data-workspace-panel=\"scoring\">\r\n    <details class=\"accordion-section\">\r\n      <summary class=\"accordion-header\">\r\n        <span>Award Place Points</span>\r\n        <span class=\"accordion-icon\">â–¼</span>\r\n      </summary>\r\n      <div class=\"accordion-content\">\r\n        <div class=\"place-awards-header\">\r\n          <h3>Award Place Points</h3>\r\n          <span class=\"place-hint\" id=\"placeHint\"></span>\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"place-rows\" id=\"placeRows\"></div>\r\n        <div id=\"placePreview\" class=\"place-preview\"></div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"place-actions\">\r\n          <button id=\"autoFillBtn\" class=\"btn btn-muted\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Auto Fill by Score</button>\r\n          <button id=\"clearPlacesBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Clear</button>\r\n          <button id=\"applyPlacesBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Apply Place Awards</button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </details>\r\n  </section>\r\n\r\n  <section class=\"meta advanced-section\" data-workspace-panel=\"scoring\">\r\n    <details class=\"accordion-section\">\r\n      <summary class=\"accordion-header\">\r\n        <span>Quick Actions & Settings</span>\r\n        <span class=\"accordion-icon\">â–¼</span>\r\n      </summary>\r\n      <div class=\"accordion-content\" style=\"display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center\">\r\n        <button id=\"undoBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost quick-icon-btn\" type=\"button\" data-action-control title=\"Undo Last Action\" aria-label=\"Undo Last Action\">\r\n          <span aria-hidden=\"true\">â†¶</span>\r\n        </button>\r\n        <button id=\"redoBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost quick-icon-btn\" type=\"button\" data-action-control title=\"Redo\" aria-label=\"Redo\" disabled>\r\n          <span aria-hidden=\"true\">â†·</span>\r\n        </button>\r\n        <button id=\"resetBtn\" class=\"btn btn-danger quick-icon-btn\" type=\"button\" data-action-control title=\"Reset All Scores\" aria-label=\"Reset All Scores\">\r\n          <span aria-hidden=\"true\">âŸ³</span>\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </details>\r\n  </section>\r\n\r\n  <section class=\"activity-log advanced-section\" data-workspace-panel=\"history\">\r\n    <details class=\"accordion-section\">\r\n      <summary class=\"accordion-header\">\r\n        <span>Activity Explorer</span>\r\n        <span class=\"accordion-icon\">â–¼</span>\r\n      </summary>\r\n      <div class=\"accordion-content\">\r\n        <h4>Activity Explorer</h4>\r\n        <div id=\"historyStats\" class=\"history-stats\"></div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"history-tools\">\r\n          <input id=\"historySearch\" type=\"text\" placeholder=\"Search name, author, or action\" data-action-control>\r\n          <div class=\"history-filters\">\r\n            <select id=\"historyPreset\" data-action-control>\r\n              <option value=\"all\">All time</option>\r\n              <option value=\"today\">Today</option>\r\n              <option value=\"week\">Last 7 days</option>\r\n              <option value=\"month\">This month</option>\r\n            </select>\r\n            <input id=\"historyStart\" type=\"datetime-local\" data-action-control>\r\n            <input id=\"historyEnd\" type=\"datetime-local\" data-action-control>\r\n            <select id=\"historySort\" data-action-control>\r\n              <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\r\n              <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\r\n              <option value=\"largest\">Biggest change</option>\r\n            </select>\r\n            <select id=\"historyType\" data-action-control>\r\n              <option value=\"all\">All actions</option>\r\n              <option value=\"applied\">Applied</option>\r\n              <option value=\"proposal\">Pending Proposals</option>\r\n              <option value=\"proposal_approved\">Approved Suggestions</option>\r\n              <option value=\"proposal_rejected\">Rejected Suggestions</option>\r\n              <option value=\"delta\">Score edits</option>\r\n              <option value=\"place_awards\">Place awards</option>\r\n              <option value=\"reset\">Resets</option>\r\n            </select>\r\n            <select id=\"historyLimit\" data-action-control>\r\n              <option value=\"12\">Show 12</option>\r\n              <option value=\"25\">Show 25</option>\r\n              <option value=\"50\">Show 50</option>\r\n            </select>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"checkpoint-row\" id=\"checkpointRow\">\r\n          <input id=\"checkpointName\" type=\"text\" maxlength=\"60\" placeholder=\"Savepoint label (example: Friday assembly before finals)\" data-action-control>\r\n          <button id=\"checkpointBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Create Savepoint</button>\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"history-actions\">\r\n          <input id=\"commitLabel\" type=\"text\" maxlength=\"40\" placeholder=\"Optional commit label (applies to new commits)\" data-action-control>\r\n          <input id=\"jumpTime\" type=\"datetime-local\" data-action-control>\r\n          <button id=\"jumpBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Open Closest Entry</button>\r\n          <button id=\"backupBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Download JSON Backup</button>\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <ul id=\"historyList\"><li class=\"log-empty\">No history yet</li></ul>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </details>\r\n  </section>\r\n\r\n  <section class=\"activity-log advanced-section\" id=\"proposalPanel\" data-workspace-panel=\"queue\">\r\n    <h4>Approval Queue</h4>\r\n    <p class=\"muted\">Viewers can suggest points here. Admins approve or reject.</p>\r\n\r\n    <div class=\"approval-controls\">\r\n      <div class=\"approval-filters\">\r\n        <select id=\"approvalStatusFilter\" data-action-control>\r\n          <option value=\"\">All statuses</option>\r\n          <option value=\"pending\">Pending only</option>\r\n          <option value=\"approved\">Approved</option>\r\n          <option value=\"rejected\">Rejected</option>\r\n        </select>\r\n        <select id=\"approvalHouseFilter\" data-action-control>\r\n          <option value=\"\">All houses</option>\r\n          <option value=\"red\">Red Panda</option>\r\n          <option value=\"white\">Polar</option>\r\n          <option value=\"blue\">Grizzly</option>\r\n          <option value=\"silver\">Kodiak</option>\r\n        </select>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <div class=\"approval-bulk-actions\">\r\n        <button id=\"bulkApproveBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary btn-mini\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Approve Selected</button>\r\n        <button id=\"bulkRejectBtn\" class=\"btn btn-danger btn-mini\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Reject Selected</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <ul id=\"proposalList\"><li class=\"log-empty\">No pending suggestions</li></ul>\r\n  </section>\r\n\r\n  <section class=\"activity-log\" data-workspace-panel=\"analytics\">\r\n    <h4>Analytics Dashboard</h4>\r\n    <p class=\"muted\">House performance and activity metrics</p>\r\n\r\n    <div class=\"analytics-controls\">\r\n      <div class=\"analytics-date-range\">\r\n        <label for=\"analyticsStartDate\">From:</label>\r\n        <input id=\"analyticsStartDate\" type=\"date\" data-action-control>\r\n        <label for=\"analyticsEndDate\">To:</label>\r\n        <input id=\"analyticsEndDate\" type=\"date\" data-action-control>\r\n        <button id=\"analyticsFilterBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary btn-mini\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Apply Filter</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <div class=\"analytics-export\">\r\n        <button id=\"analyticsExportCsvBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost btn-mini\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Export CSV</button>\r\n        <button id=\"analyticsExportPdfBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost btn-mini\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Export PDF</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <!-- House Performance Summary Cards -->\r\n    <div class=\"analytics-summary-cards\" id=\"analyticsSummaryCards\"></div>\r\n\r\n    <!-- Anomaly Alert -->\r\n    <div class=\"analytics-anomaly-alert\" id=\"anomalyAlert\" hidden></div>\r\n\r\n    <!-- Tag Filter & Charts Grid -->\r\n    <div class=\"analytics-tag-filter\">\r\n      <label for=\"analyticsTagFilter\" style=\"font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px;\">Filter by Tag:</label>\r\n      <select id=\"analyticsTagFilter\" class=\"analytics-select\">\r\n        <option value=\"\">All Tags</option>\r\n      </select>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <div class=\"analytics-grid\">\r\n      <div class=\"analytics-card\">\r\n        <h5>Points by House</h5>\r\n        <canvas id=\"chartPointsByHouse\" height=\"200\"></canvas>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <div class=\"analytics-card\">\r\n        <h5>Top Scorers</h5>\r\n        <canvas id=\"chartTopScorers\" height=\"200\"></canvas>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <div class=\"analytics-card\">\r\n        <h5>Points by Category</h5>\r\n        <canvas id=\"chartPointsByTag\" height=\"200\"></canvas>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <div class=\"analytics-card\">\r\n        <h5>Historical Trend</h5>\r\n        <canvas id=\"chartHistoricalTrend\" height=\"200\"></canvas>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <!-- Fair Play Audit Trail (admin only) -->\r\n    <div class=\"analytics-audit-section\" id=\"analyticsAuditSection\" hidden>\r\n      <h5>Fair Play Audit</h5>\r\n      <div class=\"audit-trail-table\" id=\"auditTrailTable\"></div>\r\n    </div>\r\n  </section>\r\n</div>\r\n\r\n<div id=\"accountDialog\" class=\"drawer\" hidden>\r\n  <div class=\"drawer-scrim\" data-close-drawer=\"account\"></div>\r\n  <aside class=\"drawer-panel drawer-panel-right account-section\" aria-label=\"Account drawer\">\r\n    <div class=\"drawer-head\">\r\n      <h3>Account & Access</h3>\r\n      <button id=\"closeAccountBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost btn-mini\" type=\"button\">Close</button>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <div class=\"account-grid\">\r\n      <article class=\"account-card\">\r\n        <h3>Signed In</h3>\r\n        <p class=\"account-item\"><strong id=\"loggedInAs\">-</strong></p>\r\n      </article>\r\n\r\n      <article class=\"account-card\">\r\n        <h3>Permissions</h3>\r\n        <div id=\"permissionGrid\" class=\"permissions-grid\"></div>\r\n      </article>\r\n\r\n      <article class=\"account-card\">\r\n        <h3>Password Reset</h3>\r\n        <p class=\"muted\">Send reset links, generate temporary passwords, and track help requests.</p>\r\n        <div class=\"security-actions\">\r\n          <input id=\"resetEmail\" type=\"email\" placeholder=\"user@alaschools.org\" data-action-control>\r\n          <button id=\"resetPasswordBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Send Reset Link</button>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div class=\"security-actions\">\r\n          <input id=\"generatedPassword\" type=\"text\" readonly placeholder=\"Generate a strong temporary password\" data-action-control>\r\n          <button id=\"generatePasswordBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Generate</button>\r\n          <button id=\"copyGeneratedPasswordBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Copy</button>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <p id=\"passwordResetStatus\" class=\"log-empty\">Password reset links are available after sign in.</p>\r\n      </article>\r\n\r\n      <article class=\"account-card\" id=\"studentLookupPanel\">\r\n        <h3>Student Lookup</h3>\r\n        <p class=\"muted\">Find a student and house quickly by name or student ID.</p>\r\n        <div class=\"history-tools\">\r\n          <input id=\"studentLookupInput\" type=\"text\" maxlength=\"80\" placeholder=\"Type at least 2 characters (name or ID)\" data-action-control>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <p id=\"studentLookupStatus\" class=\"log-empty\">Type to search the secure student directory.</p>\r\n        <ul id=\"studentLookupResults\"><li class=\"log-empty\">No results yet.</li></ul>\r\n      </article>\r\n\r\n      <article class=\"account-card\">\r\n        <h3>Session</h3>\r\n        <button id=\"signOutBtn\" class=\"btn btn-outline\" type=\"button\">Sign Out</button>\r\n      </article>\r\n    </div>\r\n  </aside>\r\n</div>\r\n\r\n<div id=\"adminDialog\" class=\"drawer\" hidden>\r\n  <aside class=\"drawer-panel drawer-panel-left\" aria-label=\"Admin drawer\">\r\n    <div class=\"drawer-head\">\r\n      <h3>Admin Access Management</h3>\r\n      <button id=\"closeAdminBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost btn-mini\" type=\"button\">Close</button>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <section class=\"admin-section\" id=\"userAdminPanel\" hidden>\r\n      <h4 class=\"admin-section-title\">Account Management</h4>\r\n      <p class=\"admin-note\">Create users and assign role levels for control access.</p>\r\n\r\n      <div class=\"user-manager-grid\">\r\n        <input id=\"userName\" type=\"text\" maxlength=\"80\" placeholder=\"Display name\" data-action-control>\r\n        <input id=\"userEmail\" type=\"email\" placeholder=\"user@alaschools.org\" data-action-control>\r\n        <input id=\"userPassword\" type=\"text\" minlength=\"6\" placeholder=\"At least 6 characters\" data-action-control>\r\n        <select id=\"userRole\" data-action-control>\r\n          <option value=\"member\">Member</option>\r\n          <option value=\"viewer\">Viewer</option>\r\n          <option value=\"admin\">Admin</option>\r\n          <option value=\"superadmin\">Superadmin</option>\r\n        </select>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      <div class=\"user-admin-actions\">\r\n        <button id=\"createUserBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Create / Update User</button>\r\n        <button id=\"refreshUsersBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Refresh Users</button>\r\n        <button id=\"fillGeneratedPasswordBtn\" class=\"btn btn-muted\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Use Generated Password</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      <p id=\"userAdminStatus\" class=\"log-empty\">Only visible to superadmin accounts.</p>\r\n\r\n      <div class=\"history-tools\">\r\n        <input id=\"userSearch\" type=\"text\" placeholder=\"Search users by name/email\" data-action-control>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <ul id=\"userList\"><li class=\"log-empty\">No users loaded yet.</li></ul>\r\n\r\n      <div class=\"user-admin-actions\">\r\n        <button id=\"refreshResetRequestsBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Refresh Reset Requests</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <ul id=\"resetRequestList\"><li class=\"log-empty\">No reset requests loaded yet.</li></ul>\r\n    </section>\r\n\r\n    <hr class=\"admin-divider\">\r\n\r\n    <section class=\"admin-section\" id=\"catalogManagerPanel\">\r\n      <h4 class=\"admin-section-title\">Event Catalog Manager</h4>\r\n      <p class=\"admin-note\">Manage approved event paths used by all scorers.</p>\r\n      <div class=\"user-manager-grid\">\r\n        <input id=\"catalogCategoryInput\" type=\"text\" maxlength=\"40\" placeholder=\"Category (example: Sports)\" data-action-control>\r\n        <input id=\"catalogEventInput\" type=\"text\" maxlength=\"50\" placeholder=\"Event (example: Basketball)\" data-action-control>\r\n        <input id=\"catalogSubeventInput\" type=\"text\" maxlength=\"60\" placeholder=\"Subevent (example: Girls Varsity)\" data-action-control>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <div class=\"user-admin-actions\">\r\n        <button id=\"catalogAddPathBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Add / Update Path</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <ul id=\"catalogList\"><li class=\"log-empty\">No catalog entries loaded yet.</li></ul>\r\n    </section>\r\n\r\n    <hr class=\"admin-divider\">\r\n\r\n    <section class=\"admin-section\" id=\"importExportPanel\">\r\n      <h4 class=\"admin-section-title\">Data Import/Export</h4>\r\n      <p class=\"admin-note\">Import points or student-house rosters from Google Sheets CSV, then export clean CSV snapshots back to Sheets.</p>\r\n      <div class=\"user-admin-actions\">\r\n        <label for=\"pointsCsvImport\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\" style=\"cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 11px; border: none;\">\r\n          <span>Choose Points CSV</span>\r\n          <input id=\"pointsCsvImport\" type=\"file\" accept=\".csv\" style=\"display: none;\" data-action-control>\r\n        </label>\r\n        <button id=\"importPointsBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\" data-action-control hidden>Import Points</button>\r\n        <button id=\"exportPointsCsvBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Export Points CSV</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <p id=\"importPreviewStatus\" class=\"log-empty\">Load a CSV file to see preview.</p>\r\n      <ul id=\"importPreviewList\" style=\"max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto;\"></ul>\r\n\r\n      <div class=\"user-admin-actions\">\r\n        <label for=\"studentCsvImport\" class=\"btn btn-muted\" type=\"button\" style=\"cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 11px;\">\r\n          <span>Choose Student Roster CSV</span>\r\n          <input id=\"studentCsvImport\" type=\"file\" accept=\".csv\" style=\"display: none;\" data-action-control>\r\n        </label>\r\n        <button id=\"importStudentsBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\" data-action-control hidden>Import Student Roster</button>\r\n        <button id=\"exportStudentsCsvBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Export Student Roster CSV</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <p id=\"studentImportStatus\" class=\"log-empty\">Roster columns: name, house, studentId, grade, email.</p>\r\n      <ul id=\"studentImportPreviewList\" style=\"max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto;\"></ul>\r\n    </section>\r\n\r\n    <hr class=\"admin-divider\">\r\n\r\n    <section class=\"admin-section superadmin-only\" id=\"backupManagerPanel\" hidden>\r\n      <h4 class=\"admin-section-title\">System Backups</h4>\r\n      <p class=\"admin-note\">Create full backups and restore data (excluding immutable history).</p>\r\n      <div class=\"user-manager-grid\">\r\n        <input id=\"backupLabelInput\" type=\"text\" maxlength=\"80\" placeholder=\"Backup label (example: March assembly state)\" data-action-control>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <div class=\"user-admin-actions\">\r\n        <button id=\"createBackupBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Create Backup</button>\r\n        <button id=\"refreshBackupsBtn\" class=\"btn btn-ghost\" type=\"button\" data-action-control>Refresh Backups</button>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <p id=\"backupStatus\" class=\"log-empty\">Backups are only visible to superadmins.</p>\r\n      <ul id=\"backupList\"><li class=\"log-empty\">No backups loaded yet.</li></ul>\r\n    </section>\r\n  </aside>\r\n  <div class=\"drawer-scrim\" data-close-drawer=\"admin\"></div>\r\n</div>\r\n\r\n<div id=\"helpDialog\" class=\"help-modal\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-labelledby=\"helpDialogTitle\" hidden>\r\n  <div class=\"help-modal-card\" tabindex=\"-1\">\r\n    <div class=\"help-modal-header\">\r\n      <h3 id=\"helpDialogTitle\">Control Help</h3>\r\n      <button id=\"closeHelpBtn\" class=\"btn btn-outline btn-mini\" type=\"button\">Close</button>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <p class=\"help-note\">Use these controls to manage points safely during live events.</p>\r\n    <ul class=\"help-list\">\r\n      <li>Unlock scoring with a reason before editing points.</li>\r\n      <li>Use place awards for fast 1st-4th scoring.</li>\r\n      <li>Create checkpoints before major changes.</li>\r\n      <li>Use Jump to Closest to restore a time-based snapshot.</li>\r\n      <li>Download JSON backups before large edits.</li>\r\n    </ul>\r\n  </div>\r\n</div>\r\n\r\n  <section class=\"activity-log\" data-workspace-panel=\"activity\">\r\n    <h4>Recent Activity</h4>\r\n    <ul id=\"activityList\"><li class=\"log-empty\">No activity yet this session</li></ul>\r\n  </section>\r\n\r\n  <div id=\"toastContainer\" style=\"position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; z-index: 9999; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;\"></div>\r\n\r\n  <script src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.js\"></script>\r\n<script>\r\n/**\r\n * Tag Utilities: Fuzzy matching, normalization, suggestion engine\r\n *\r\n * Handles:\r\n * - Normalizing tag names for comparison (lowercase, remove punctuation/spaces)\r\n * - Fuzzy matching despite typos, capitalization, spacing\r\n * - Ranking suggestions by similarity + usage\r\n * - Preventing duplicate tags with different spellings\r\n */\r\n\r\n/**\r\n"}}

12px 28px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.16), 0 3px 8px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.14);\n+  --md-radius-xs: 8px;\n+  --md-radius-sm: 12px;\n+  --md-radius-md: 16px;\n+  --md-radius-lg: 24px;\n+  --md-radius-xl: 28px;\n+  --md-state-hover: rgba(103, 80, 164, 0.08);\n+  --md-state-focus: rgba(103, 80, 164, 0.12);\n+  --bg-a: var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+  --bg-b: #e8f3ef;\n+  --surface: var(--md-surface-container-lowest);\n+  --surface-soft: var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+  --surface-tint: var(--md-surface-container);\n+  --line: var(--md-outline-variant);\n+  --text: var(--md-on-surface);\n+  --muted: var(--md-on-surface-variant);\n+  --accent: var(--md-primary);\n+  --accent-strong: #4f378b;\n+  --danger: var(--md-error);\n+  --success: var(--md-success);\n+ { background: #7a4d00; }\n+.toast-info { background: var(--md-inverse-surface); }\n+\n+body.is-busy [data-action-control] {\n+  opacity: 0.58;\n+  filter: saturate(0.8);\n+}\n+\n+@media (max-width: 1160px) {\n+  .houses {\n+    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(240px, 1fr));\n+  }\n+\n+  .analytics-grid {\n+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+@media (max-width: 760px) {\n+  .wrap {\n+    padding: 12px 12px 32px;\n+  }\n+\n+  .topbar {\n+    position: static;\n+    border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  }\n+\n+  .workspace-nav {\n+    top: 0;\n+    grid-template-columns: repeat(5, max-content);\n+    overflow-x: auto;\n+    border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+    justify-content: start;\n+    scrollbar-width: none;\n+  }\n+\n+  .workspace-nav::-webkit-scrollbar {\n+    display: none;\n+  }\n+\n+  .workspace-tab {\n+    min-width: 104px;\n+  }\n+\n+  .houses {\n+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n+  }\n+\n+  .quick-stats-card {\n+    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n+  }\n+\n+  .drawer-panel,\n+  .tag-modal-panel,\n+  .email-modal-panel {\n+    width: calc(100vw - 16px);\n+    margin: 8px;\n+    border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+@media (max-width: 480px) {\n+  .login-card {\n+    padding: 24px;\n+  }\n+\n+  .quick-stats-card {\n+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n+  }\n+\n+  .topbar-actions {\n+    justify-content: flex-start;\n+  }\n+\n+  .icon-btn {\n+    width: 42px;\n+    height: 42px;\n+  }\n+\n+  .card,\n+  .reason-lock,\n+  .place-awards,\n+  .activity-log {\n+    border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  }\n+}\n </style>\n*** End Patch\n"}}

--md-outline-variant: #cac4d0;\n+  --md-inverse-surface: #322f35;\n+  --md-scrim: rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.42);\n+  --md-elevation-1: 0 1px 2px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.18), 0 1px 3px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.12);\n+  --md-elevation-2: 0 2px 6px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.16), 0 1px 2px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.12);\n+  --md-elevation-3: 0 6px 16px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.14), 0 2px 4px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.12);\n+  --md-elevation-4: 0 12px 28px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.16), 0 3px 8px rgba(29, 27, 32, 0.14);\n+  --md-radius-sm: 12px;\n+  --md-radius-md: 16px;\n+  --md-radius-lg: 24px;\n+  --md-radius-xl: 28px;\n+  --md-state-hover: rgba(103, 80, 164, 0.08);\n+  --bg-a: var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+  --bg-b: #e8f3ef;\n+  --surface: var(--md-surface-container-lowest);\n+  --surface-soft: var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+  --surface-tint: var(--md-surface-container);\n+  --line: var(--md-outline-variant);\n+  --text: var(--md-on-surface);\n+  --muted: var(--md-on-surface-variant);\n+  --accent: var(--md-primary);\n+  --accent-strong: #4f378b;\n+  --danger: var(--md-error);\n+  --success: var(--md-success);\n+  --warning: var(--md-warning);\n+  --radius-lg: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  --radius-md: var(--md-radius-md);\n+  --radius-sm: var(--md-radius-sm);\n+}\n+\n+html { background: var(--md-surface); }\n+\n+body {\n+  min-height: 100dvh;\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface);\n+  background:\n+    linear-gradient(120deg, rgba(234, 221, 255, 0.82), transparent 36%),\n+    linear-gradient(240deg, rgba(116, 248, 232, 0.34), transparent 30%),\n+    linear-gradient(180deg, var(--md-surface-container-low), #edf7f4 48%, var(--md-surface) 100%);\n+  letter-spacing: 0;\n+}\n+\n+.wrap {\n+  width: min(1440px, 100%);\n+  padding: 24px clamp(16px, 2.4vw, 40px) 48px;\n+}\n+\n+.login-shell {\n+  background:\n+    linear-gradient(140deg, rgba(103, 80, 164, 0.2), transparent 38%),\n+    linear-gradient(35deg, rgba(0, 106, 96, 0.16), transparent 44%),\n+    var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+}\n+\n+.login-card {\n+  width: min(480px, calc(100vw - 32px));\n+  padding: 32px;\n+  border: 1px solid rgba(103, 80, 164, 0.16);\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-xl);\n+  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--md-surface-container-lowest) 92%, var(--md-primary-container));\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-4);\n+}\n+\n+.login-card h1,\n+.topbar h2 {\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface);\n+  letter-spacing: 0;\n+}\n+\n+.login-subtitle,\n+.muted,\n+.admin-note,\n+.history-meta,\n+.proposal-meta,\n+.user-meta,\n+.catalog-meta,\n+.backup-meta,\n+.student-meta {\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface-variant);\n+}\n+\n+.topbar {\n+  position: sticky;\n+  top: 0;\n+  z-index: 70;\n+  margin: -8px -8px 0;\n+  padding: 12px;\n+  border: 1px solid rgba(202, 196, 208, 0.7);\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-xl);\n+  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--md-surface-container-lowest) 78%, transparent);\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-1);\n+  backdrop-filter: blur(18px);\n+}\n+\n+.topbar h2 {\n+  font-size: clamp(22px, 2.4vw, 32px);\n+  font-weight: 800;\n+}\n+\n+.sync-status {\n+  display: inline-flex;\n+  align-items: center;\n+  gap: 8px;\n+  min-height: 28px;\n+  margin-top: 8px;\n+  padding: 4px 12px;\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container);\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface-variant);\n+}\n+\n+.sync-status::before {\n+  content: \"\";\n+  width: 8px;\n+  height: 8px;\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  background: currentColor;\n+}\n+\n+.sync-status[data-tone=\"live\"],\n+.sync-status[data-tone=\"success\"] {\n+  color: var(--md-success);\n+  background: #d9f6e7;\n+}\n+\n+.sync-status[data-tone=\"warn\"] {\n+  color: var(--md-warning);\n+  background: #ffedcf;\n+}\n+\n+.topbar-actions { gap: 10px; }\n+\n+.icon-btn,\n+.btn-icon-close {\n+  width: 44px;\n+  height: 44px;\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  display: inline-grid;\n+  place-items: center;\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-high);\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface-variant);\n+  box-shadow: none;\n+  transition: background 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease;\n+}\n+\n+.icon-btn:hover,\n+.btn-icon-close:hover {\n+  background: var(--md-primary-container);\n+  color: var(--md-on-primary-container);\n+  transform: translateY(-1px);\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-1);\n+}\n+\n+.icon-profile {\n+  background: var(--md-primary);\n+  color: var(--md-on-primary);\n+  font-weight: 800;\n+}\n+\n+.icon-bars,\n+.icon-bars::before,\n+.icon-bars::after {\n+  display: block;\n+  width: 18px;\n+  height: 2px;\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  background: currentColor;\n+  content: \"\";\n+}\n+\n+.icon-bars { position: relative; }\n+.icon-bars::before,\n+.icon-bars::after {\n+  position: absolute;\n+  left: 0;\n+}\n+.icon-bars::before { top: -6px; }\n+.icon-bars::after { top: 6px; }\n+\n+.quick-stats-card {\n+  margin: 18px 0 14px;\n+  padding: 8px;\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-xl);\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container);\n+  box-shadow: none;\n+}\n+\n+.stat-item {\n+  min-height: 92px;\n+  padding: 16px;\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-lowest);\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-1);\n+}\n+\n+.stat-label {\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface-variant);\n+  text-transform: none;\n+  letter-spacing: 0;\n+}\n+\n+.stat-value {\n+  color: var(--md-primary);\n+  font-size: clamp(20px, 2vw, 28px);\n+}\n+\n+.workspace-nav {\n+  position: sticky;\n+  top: 92px;\n+  z-index: 60;\n+  display: grid;\n+  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));\n+  gap: 4px;\n+  margin: 14px 0;\n+  padding: 6px;\n+  border: 1px solid rgba(202, 196, 208, 0.78);\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--md-surface-container-lowest) 78%, transparent);\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-1);\n+  backdrop-filter: blur(18px);\n+}\n+\n+.workspace-tab {\n+  min-height: 44px;\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  background: transparent;\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface-variant);\n+  font-weight: 750;\n+}\n+\n+.workspace-tab:hover {\n+  background: var(--md-state-hover);\n+  transform: none;\n+}\n+\n+.workspace-tab.is-active {\n+  background: var(--md-secondary-container);\n+  color: #00201c;\n+  border: 0;\n+  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 106, 96, 0.12);\n+}\n+\n+.reason-lock,\n+.place-awards,\n+.activity-log,\n+.panel,\n+.account-card,\n+.analytics-card,\n+.admin-section,\n+.tag-modal-panel,\n+.email-modal-panel,\n+.help-modal-card,\n+.help-card,\n+.popup-section {\n+  border: 1px solid rgba(202, 196, 208, 0.72);\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-xl);\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-lowest);\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-1);\n+}\n+\n+.reason-lock,\n+.place-awards,\n+.activity-log {\n+  padding: 18px;\n+}\n+\n+.reason-lock {\n+  background:\n+    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(234, 221, 255, 0.72), }\n+\n+.drawer-scrim,\n+.tag-modal-scrim,\n+.email-modal-scrim,\n+.help-dialog,\n+.help-modal {\n+  background: var(--md-scrim);\n+  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n+}\n+\n+.drawer-panel {\n+  width: }\n+\n+.account-grid,\n+.user-manager-grid,\n+.analytics-grid {\n+  gap: 14px;\n+}\n+\n+.admin-divider {\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-top: 1px solid var(--md-outline-variant);\n+  margin: 18px 0;\n+}\n+\n+.admin-section {\n+  padding: 16px;\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+}\n+\n+.account-card,\n+.analytics-card {\n+  padding: 16px;\n+}\n+\n+.analytics-grid {\n+  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n+}\n+\n+.analytics-card canvas {\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-md);\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-lowest);\n+}\n+\n+.toast {\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-sm);\n+  background: var(--md-inverse-surface);\n+  color: #f5eff7;\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-3);\n+}\n+\n+.toast-success { background: #146c43; }\n+.toast-warn { background: #7a4d00; }\n+.toast-info { background: var(--md-inverse-surface); }\n+\n+body.is-busy [data-action-control] {\n+  opacity: 0.58;\n+  filter: saturate(0.8);\n+}\n+\n+@media (max-width: 1160px) {\n+  .houses {\n+    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(240px, 1fr));\n+  }\n+\n+  .analytics-grid {\n+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+@media (max-width: 760px) {\n+    display: none;\n+  }\n+\n+  .workspace-tab {\n+    min-width: 104px;\n+  }\n+\n+  .houses {\n+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n+  }\n+\n+  .quick-stats-card {\n+    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n+  }\n+\n+  .drawer-panel,\n+  .tag-modal-panel,\n+  .email-modal-panel {\n+    width: calc(100vw - 16px);\n+    margin: 8px;\n+    border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+@media (max-width: 480px) {\n+  .login-card { padding: 24px; }\n+\n+  .quick-stats-card {\n+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n+  }\n+\n+  .topbar-actions {\n+    justify-content: flex-start;\n+  }\n+\n+  .icon-btn {\n+    width: 42px;\n+    height: 42px;\n+  }\n+\n+  .card,\n+  .reason-lock,\n+  .place-awards,\n+  .activity-log {\n+    border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+ box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-2);\n+  padding: 16px;\n+  transition: transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease;\n+}\n+\n+.card:hover {\n+  transform: translateY(-2px);\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-3);\n+  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--house-bg) 45%, var(--md-outline-variant));\n+}\n+\n+.card-head {\n+  min-height: 72px;\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  padding: 14px;\n+  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);\n+}\n+\n+.card-head h3 {\n+  font-size: 16px;\n+  line-height: 1.15;\n+}\n+\n+.rank-pill {\n+  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--house-text) 18%, transparent);\n+  color: var(--house-text);\n+  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--house-text) 30%, transparent);\n+}\n+\n+.points {\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface);\n+  font-size: clamp(40px, 4vw, 56px);\n+  letter-spacing: 0;\n+}\n+\n+.quick-group,\n+.tag-selector-section,\n+.modal-amount-section,\n+.tag-chips-section,\n+.account-grid,\n+.analytics-summary-card,\n+.analytics-anomaly-alert,\n+.analytics-audit-section {\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+  box-shadow: none;\n+}\n+\n+.quick-group { padding: 12px; }\n+\n+.quick-title,\n+.stat-label {\n+  text-transform: none;\n+  letter-spacing: 0;\n+}\n+\n+.btn {\n+  min-height: 40px;\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  padding: 10px 18px;\n+  font-weight: 760;\n+  letter-spacing: 0;\n+  box-shadow: none;\n+  transition: background 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease, color 150ms ease;\n+}\n+\n+.btn:hover {\n+  transform: translateY(-1px);\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-1);\n+}\n+\n+.btn:focus-visible,\n+.icon-btn:focus-visible,\n+.btn-icon-close:focus-visible {\n+  outline: 3px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--md-primary) 35%, transparent);\n+  outline-offset: 2px;\n+}\n+\n+.btn-primary {\n+  background: var(--md-primary);\n+  color: var(--md-on-primary);\n+}\n+\n+.btn-primary:hover { background: #5b4499; }\n+\n+.btn-muted,\n+.btn-ghost {\n+  background: var(--md-secondary-container);\n+  color: #00201c;\n+}\n+\n+.btn-outline {\n+  background: transparent;\n+  color: var(--md-primary);\n+  border: 1px solid var(--md-outline);\n+}\n+\n+.btn-danger {\n+  background: var(--md-error-container);\n+  color: #410002;\n+}\n+\n+.btn-score-plus {\n+  background: #d9f6e7;\n+  color: #06391f;\n+}\n+\n+.btn-score-minus {\n+  background: var(--md-error-container);\n+  color: #410002;\n+}\n+\n+.btn-tag-score {\n+  background: var(--md-primary);\n+  color: var(--md-on-primary);\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-1);\n+}\n+\n+.btn-amount,\n+.btn-amount-modal {\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  border: 1px solid var(--md-outline-variant);\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-lowest);\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface);\n+}\n+\n+.btn-amount.selected,\n+.btn-amount-modal.selected {\n+  background: var(--md-primary-container);\n+  color: var(--md-on-primary-container);\n+  border-color: transparent;\n+}\n+\n+.accordion-section {\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  overflow: hidden;\n+}\n+\n+.accordion-header {\n+  min-height: 52px;\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  padding: 14px 16px;\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+  color: var(--md-on-surface);\n+}\n+\n+.accordion-content { padding: 16px 2px 2px; }\n+\n+.history-item,\n+.proposal-item,\n+.user-item,\n+.catalog-item,\n+.student-item,\n+.backup-item,\n+.log-entry,\n+.audit-trail-row {\n+  border: 1px solid transparent;\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+  padding: 12px;\n+  box-shadow: none;\n+}\n+\n+.history-item + .history-item,\n+.proposal-item + .proposal-item,\n+.user-item + .user-item,\n+.catalog-item + .catalog-item,\n+.backup-item + .backup-item {\n+  margin-top: 8px;\n+}\n+\n+#historyList,\n+#activityList,\n+#proposalList,\n+#userList,\n+#catalogList,\n+#studentLookupResults,\n+#backupList,\n+#resetRequestList,\n+#importPreviewList,\n+#studentImportPreviewList {\n+  list-style: none;\n+  margin: 12px 0 0;\n+  padding: 0;\n+  display: grid;\n+  gap: 8px;\n+}\n+\n+.drawer { background: transparent; }\n+\n+.drawer-scrim,\n+.tag-modal-scrim,\n+.email-modal-scrim,\n+.help-dialog,\n+.help-modal {\n+  background: var(--md-scrim);\n+  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n+}\n+\n+.drawer-panel {\n+  width: min(760px, calc(100vw - 24px));\n+  border: 1px solid rgba(202, 196, 208, 0.7);\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-xl);\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-lowest);\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-4);\n+  padding: 20px;\n+}\n+\n+.drawer-panel-left { margin: 12px auto 12px 12px; }\n+.drawer-panel-right { margin: 12px 12px 12px auto; }\n+\n+.account-grid,\n+.user-manager-grid,\n+.analytics-grid {\n+  gap: 14px;\n+}\n+\n+.admin-divider {\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-top: 1px solid var(--md-outline-variant);\n+  margin: 18px 0;\n+}\n+\n+.admin-section {\n+  padding: 16px;\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-low);\n+}\n+\n+.account-card,\n+.analytics-card {\n+  padding: 16px;\n+}\n+\n+.analytics-grid {\n+  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n+}\n+\n+.analytics-card canvas {\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-md);\n+  background: var(--md-surface-container-lowest);\n+}\n+\n+.toast {\n+  border-radius: var(--md-radius-sm);\n+  background: var(--md-inverse-surface);\n+  color: #f5eff7;\n+  box-shadow: var(--md-elevation-3);\n+}\n+\n+.toast-success { background: #146c43; }\n+.toast-warn { background: #7a4d00; }\n+.toast-info { background: var(--md-inverse-surface); }\n+\n+body.is-busy [data-action-control] {\n+  opacity: 0.58;\n+  filter: saturate(0.8);\n+}\n+\n+@media (max-width: 1160px) {\n+  .houses {\n+    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(240px, 1fr));\n+  }\n+\n+  .analytics-grid {\n+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+@media (max-width: 760px) {\n+ repeat(5, max-content);\n+    overflow-x: auto;\n+    border-radius: var(--md-radius-lg);\n+    justify-content: start;\n+    scrollbar-width: none;\n+  }\n+\n+  .workspace-nav::-webkit-scrollbar {\n+ {"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:07:31.997Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"Done. I gave the dashboard a broad Material 3 style overwrite and synced it everywhere:\n\n- Classic dashboard: [control.html](/c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/control.html)\n- iPhone source: [control1.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/control1.html>)\n- Generated iPhone web asset: [index.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/www/index.html>)\n\nWhat changed:\n- Material 3 token system: surfaces, primary/secondary containers, elevation, state layers, rounded component shape.\n- Refreshed sticky topbar, icon buttons, segmented workspace menu, stats cards.\n- Reworked cards, drawers, modals, accordions, lists, forms, buttons, chips, analytics panels.\n- Better mobile behavior for tabs, drawers, cards, and grids.\n- Kept classic and iPhone versions byte-for-byte synced.\n\nVerified:\n- `npm.cmd run check`\n- embedded module syntax for all three HTML files\n- `control.html` serves locally at `http://127.0.0.1:5173/control.html`\n- iPhone source matches generated `www/index.html`","phase":"final_answer","memory_citation":null}}
