{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:20:06.992Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"That screenshot is super helpful. The header/workspace are floating over the form because the sticky styling is fighting the page flow, and the scoring form is doing too much ceremony. I’m going to fix the layout collision first, then simplify scoring into a reason-first box with fuzzy/keyword suggestions and keep the hidden classification fields populated behind the scenes so existing scoring logic still works. Also: Firebase does not expose a user’s current password to any client app or admin UI, so I’ll build the honest admin-safe version: generated temporary passwords and reset links, with clear status instead of pretending we can reveal stored passwords.","phase":"commentary","memory_citation":null}}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:20:06.993Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"That screenshot is super helpful. The header/workspace are floating over the form because the sticky styling is fighting the page flow, and the scoring form is doing too much ceremony. I’m going to fix the layout collision first, then simplify scoring into a reason-first box with fuzzy/keyword suggestions and keep the hidden classification fields populated behind the scenes so existing scoring logic still works. Also: Firebase does not expose a user’s current password to any client app or admin UI, so I’ll build the honest admin-safe version: generated temporary passwords and reset links, with clear status instead of pretending we can reveal stored passwords."}],"phase":"commentary"}}

\"\").trim();\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Modal backdrop click to close\r\n    const scrim = this.modal.querySelector(\".tag-modal-scrim\");\r\n    scrim?.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.close());\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async open(houseId) {\r\n    this.selectedHouseId = houseId;\r\n    this.selectedTags = [];\r\n    this.selectedAmount = 0;\r\n    this.selectedNotes = \"\";\r\n\r\n status: \"open\",\r\n    userId: currentUserUid || \"\",\r\n    userEmail: currentUserEmail || normalizedEmail,\r\n    createdAt: serverTimestamp(),\r\n    createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n    read: false\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction mapActionTypeLabel(type) {\r\n  if (type === \"delta\") return \"Score Edit\";\r\n  if (type === \"place_awards\") return \"Place Awards\";\r\n  if (type === \"reset\") return \"Reset\";\r\n  if (type === \"savepoint\") return \"Savepoint\";\r\n  if (type === \"restore_savepoint\") return \"Restore\";\r\n  if (type === \"proposal_submitted\") return \"Suggestion\";\r\n  if (type === \"proposal_approved\") return \"Suggestion Approved\";\r\n  if (type === \"proposal_rejected\") return \"Suggestion Rejected\";\r\n  if (type === \"path_request_submitted\") return \"Path Request\";\r\n  if (type === \"path_request_approved\") return \"Path Approved\";\r\n  if (type === \"path_request_rejected\") return \"Path Rejected\";\r\n  return \"Action\";\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction changeMagnitude(changes = {}) {\r\n  return Math.abs(Number(changes.red || 0)) + Math.abs(Number(changes.white || 0)) + Math.abs(Number(changes.blue || 0)) + Math.abs(Number(changes.silver || 0));\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction applyChanges(scores, changes = {}) {\r\n  return {\r\n    red: Math.max(0, scoreNumber(scores, \"red\") + Number(changes.red || 0)),\r\n    white: Math.max(0, scoreNumber(scores, \"white\") + Number(changes.white || 0)),\r\n    blue: Math.max(0, scoreNumber(scores, \"blue\") + Number(changes.blue || 0)),\r\n    silver: Math.max(0, scoreNumber(scores, \"silver\") + Number(changes.silver || 0))\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction changesFromHouseDelta(house, delta) {\r\n  return {\r\n    red: house === \"red\" ? delta : 0,\r\n    white: house === \"white\" ? delta : 0,\r\n    blue: house === \"blue\" ? delta : 0,\r\n    silver: house === \"silver\" ? delta : 0\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction normalizeEventCatalog(raw = {}) {\r\n  const categories = Array.isArray(raw?.categories) ? raw.categories : [];\r\n  const normalized = categories\r\n    .map(category => {\r\n      const categoryId = safeId(category.id || category.name);\r\n      const categoryName = String(category.name || \"\").trim();\r\n      const eventsRaw = Array.isArray(category.events) ? category.events : [];\r\n      const events = eventsRaw\r\n        .map(event => {\r\n          const eventId = safeId(event.id || event.name);\r\n          const eventName = String(event.name || \"\").trim();\r\n          const subeventsRaw = Array.isArray(event.subevents) ? event.subevents : [];\r\n          const subevents = subeventsRaw\r\n            .map(subevent => {\r\n              const subeventId = safeId(subevent.id || subevent.name);\r\n              const subeventName = String(subevent.name || \"\").trim();\r\n              if (!subeventId || !subeventName) return null;\r\n              return { id: subeventId, name: subeventName };\r\n            })\r\n            .filter(Boolean);\r\n          if (!eventId || !eventName) return null;\r\n          return {\r\n            id: eventId,\r\n            name: eventName,\r\n            subevents: subevents.length ? subevents : [{ id: \"general\", name: \"General\" }]\r\n          };\r\n        })\r\n        .filter(Boolean);\r\n      if (!categoryId || !categoryName || !events.length) return null;\r\n      return { id: categoryId, name: categoryName, events };\r\n    })\r\n    .filter(Boolean);\r\n\r\n  if (normalized.length) {\r\n    return { categories: normalized };\r\n  }\r\n  return structuredClone(DEFAULT_EVENT_CATALOG);\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getCategoryById(categoryId) {\r\n  return eventCatalog.categories.find(category => category.id === categoryId) || null;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getEventById(category, eventId) {\r\n  if (!category) return null;\r\n  return category.events.find(event => event.id === eventId) || null;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getSubeventById(event, subeventId) {\r\n  if (!event) return null;\r\n  return event.subevents.find(subevent => subevent.id === subeventId) || null;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction selectedRoute() {\r\n  if (!dom.categorySelect || !dom.eventSelect || !dom.subeventSelect) return null;\r\n  const category = getCategoryById(dom.categorySelect.value);\r\n  const event = getEventById(category, dom.eventSelect.value);\r\n  const subevent = getSubeventById(event, dom.subeventSelect.value);\r\n  if (!category || !event || !subevent) return null;\r\n  return {\r\n    categoryId: category.id,\r\n    categoryName: category.name,\r\n    eventId: event.id,\r\n    eventName: event.name,\r\n    subeventId: subevent.id,\r\n    subeventName: subevent.name\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction buildContextFromInputs() {\r\n  if (!dom.reasonInput || !dom.notesInput || !dom.eventModeSelect || !dom.seasonInput || !dom.sessionInput) return null;\r\n  const route = selectedRoute();\r\n  if (!route) return null;\r\n  const reason = String(dom.reasonInput.value || \"\").trim();\r\n  const notes = String(dom.notesInput.value || \"\").trim();\r\n  const eventMode = dom.eventModeSelect.value === \"session\" ? \"session\" : \"recurring\";\r\n  const season = String(dom.seasonInput.value || \"\").trim().slice(0, 30);\r\n  const sessionName = String(dom.sessionInput.value || \"\").trim().slice(0, 40);\r\n  if (!reason) return null;\r\n  if (eventMode === \"session\" && !sessionName) return null;\r\n  return {\r\n    ...route,\r\n    eventMode,\r\n    season,\r\n    sessionName,\r\n    reason,\r\n    notes,\r\n    pathLabel: `${route.categoryName} > ${route.eventName} > ${route.subeventName}`\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction updateContextSummary() {\r\n  if (!dom.contextSummary || !dom.reasonLockState) return;\r\n  if (!activeContext) {\r\n    dom.contextSummary.textContent = \"No active event context.\";\r\n    dom.reasonLockState.textContent = \"Locked\";\r\n    dom.reasonLockState.className = \"status-chip status-failed\";\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  const modeLabel = activeContext.eventMode === \"session\" ? `Session: ${activeContext.sessionName}` : \"Recurring\";\r\n  const seasonLabel = activeContext.season ? ` â€¢ ${activeContext.season}` : \"\";\r\n  dom.contextSummary.textContent = `${activeContext.pathLabel} â€¢ ${modeLabel}${seasonLabel} â€¢ ${activeContext.reason}`;\r\n  dom.reasonLockState.textContent = \"Active\";\r\n  dom.reasonLockState.className = \"status-chip status-sent\";\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction updateQuickStats() {\r\n  const today = new Date();\r\n  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\r\n  const todayMs = today.getTime();\r\n\r\n  const todayEntries = auditEntries.filter(e => {\r\n    const entryDate = new Date(Number(e.createdAtMs || 0));\r\n    entryDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\r\n    return entryDate.getTime() === todayMs && e.status === \"applied\";\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const todayPoints = todayEntries.reduce((sum, e) => {\r\n    const c = e.changes || {};\r\n    return sum + (c.red || 0) + (c.white || 0) + (c.blue || 0) + (c.silver || 0);\r\n  }, 0);\r\n\r\n  const currentScores = { red: 0, white: 0, blue: 0, silver: 0 };\r\n  houses.forEach(h => {\r\n    currentScores[h.id] = Number(currentScores[h.id] || 0);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  let leader = \"â€“\";\r\n  let maxScore = -Infinity;\r\n  houses.forEach(house => {\r\n    const score = Number(currentScores[house.id] || 0);\r\n    if (score > maxScore) {\r\n      maxScore = score;\r\n      leader = house.name.split(\" \")[0];\r\n    }\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  let trend = \"â€“\";\r\n  const weekAgo = todayMs - (7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\r\n  const weekEntries = auditEntries.filter(e => Number(e.createdAtMs || 0) >= weekAgo && e.status === \"applied\");\r\n  if (weekEntries.length > 0 && todayEntries.length > 0) {\r\n    const avgPerDay = weekEntries.length / 7;\r\n    const todayCount = todayEntries.length;\r\n    if (todayCount > avgPerDay * 1.1) trend = \"â†‘\";\r\n    else if (todayCount < avgPerDay * 0.9) trend = \"â†“\";\r\n    else trend = \"â†’\";\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const activeHouses = new Set();\r\n  auditEntries.forEach(e => {\r\n    const c = e.changes || {};\r\n    if (c.red) activeHouses.add(\"Red\");\r\n    if (c.white) activeHouses.add(\"White\");\r\n    if (c.blue) activeHouses.add(\"Blue\");\r\n    if (c.silver) activeHouses.add(\"Silver\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  if (dom.todayPointsCount) dom.todayPointsCount.textContent = String(todayPoints);\r\n  if (dom.currentLeaderName) dom.currentLeaderName.textContent = leader;\r\n  if (dom.weekTrendIndicator) dom.weekTrendIndicator.textContent = trend;\r\n  if (dom.activeHousesCount) dom.activeHousesCount.textContent = String(activeHouses.size);\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ============ TAG LIBRARY ============\r\n\r\nclass TagLibrary {\r\n  constructor() {\r\n    this.tags = [];\r\n    this.index = {}; // normalized name â†’ tag object\r\n    this.byCategory = {}; // category path â†’ tags array\r\n    this.lastSync = null;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async load() {\r\n    try {\r\n      const querySnap = await getDocs(query(collection(db, \"eventTags\"), where(\"approved\", \"==\", true)));\r\n      this.tags = querySnap.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));\r\n\r\n      // Build index and category grouping\r\n      this.index = {};\r\n      this.byCategory = {};\r\n      this.tags.forEach(tag => {\r\n        const norm = String(tag.normalizedName || \"\").toLowerCase();\r\n        this.index[norm] = tag;\r\n        const cat = tag.categoryPath || \"Other\";\r\n        if (!this.byCategory[cat]) this.byCategory[cat] = [];\r\n        this.byCategory[cat].push(tag);\r\n      });\r\n\r\n      // Sort by usage count within each category\r\n      Object.values(this.byCategory).forEach(arr => {\r\n        arr.sort((a, b) => (b.usage?.count || 0) - (a.usage?.count || 0));\r\n      });\r\n\r\n      this.lastSync = Date.now();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (error) {\r\n      console.error(\"Failed to load tag library:\", error);\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  search(query) {\r\n    if (!query || query.trim().length === 0) {\r\n      // Return top tags by category if no query\r\n      return this.getTopTags();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const results = [];\r\n    const queryLower = query.toLowerCase().trim();\r\n\r\n    // Use fuzzyMatchScore from tag-utils.js if available\r\n    this.tags.forEach(tag => {\r\n      const score = typeof fuzzyMatchScore === \"function\" ?\r\n        fuzzyMatchScore(tag.normalizedName, queryLower) :\r\n        (tag.name.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower) ? 100 : 0);\r\n\r\n      if (score > 30) {\r\n        results.push({ ...tag, _score: score });\r\n      }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Sort by score, then by usage\r\n    results.sort((a, b) => {\r\n      const scoreDiff = b._score - a._score;\r\n      if (Math.abs(scoreDiff) > 10) return scoreDiff;\r\n      return (b.usage?.count || 0) - (a.usage?.count || 0);\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    return results.slice(0, 20); // Return top 20 matches\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  getTopTags() {\r\n    const results = [];\r\n    Object.values(this.byCategory).forEach(tags => {\r\n      results.push(...tags.slice(0, 3)); // Top 3 per category\r\n    });\r\n    return results.slice(0, 20);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  getGroupedTags(searchQuery) {\r\n    const results = this.search(searchQuery);\r\n    const grouped = {};\r\n\r\n    results.forEach(tag => {\r\n      const cat = tag.categoryPath || \"Other\";\r\n      if (!grouped[cat]) grouped[cat] = [];\r\n      grouped[cat].push(tag);\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    return grouped;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async recordUsage(tagId, houseId) {\r\n    try {\r\n      const tagRef = doc(db, \"eventTags\", tagId);\r\n      await updateDoc(tagRef, {\r\n        \"usage.count\": increment(1),\r\n        \"usage.lastUsed\": serverTimestamp(),\r\n        [`usage.byHouse.${houseId}`]: increment(1),\r\n      });\r\n    } catch (error) {\r\n      console.warn(\"Could not record tag usage:\", error);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async proposeCustomTag(name, category = \"Custom\") {\r\n    try {\r\n      const normalized = name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, \"\");\r\n\r\n      // Check for similar existing tags\r\n      const similar = this.tags.filter(t => {\r\n        const score = typeof fuzzyMatchScore === \"function\" ?\r\n          fuzzyMatchScore(t.normalizedName, normalized) : 0;\r\n        return score > 85;\r\n      });\r\n\r\n      const docRef = await addDoc(collection(db, \"eventTagProposals\"), {\r\n        tagName: name,\r\n        normalizedName: normalized,\r\n        category,\r\n        proposedBy: currentUserEmail || \"anonymous\",\r\n        proposedAt: serverTimestamp(),\r\n        status: \"auto-approved\", // Based on user decision: auto-approve for now\r\n        similarTags: similar.map(t => t.id),\r\n        usageCount: 0,\r\n      });\r\n\r\n      return docRef.id;\r\n    } catch (error) {\r\n      console.error(\"Failed to propose custom tag:\", error);\r\n      return null;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ============ TAG MODAL CONTROLLER ============\r\n\r\nclass TagModalController {\r\n  constructor(tagLibrary) {\r\n    this.tagLibrary = tagLibrary;\r\n    this.selectedHouseId = null;\r\n    this.selectedTags = [];\r\n    this.selectedAmount = 0;\r\n    this.selectedNotes = \"\";\r\n    this.modal = document.getElementById(\"tagModalOverlay\");\r\n    this.setupEventListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setupEventListeners() {\r\n    if (!this.modal) return;\r\n\r\n    const closeBtn = document.getElementById(\"closeTagModalBtn\");\r\n    const cancelBtn = document.getElementById(\"cancelTagModalBtn\");\r\n    const applyBtn = document.getElementById(\"applyTagsBtn\");\r\n    const searchField = document.getElementById(\"tagSearchField\");\r\n    const customAmountInput = document.getElementById(\"modalCustomAmount\");\r\n    const notesInput = document.getElementById(\"modalNotesInput\");\r\n    const amountButtons = document.querySelectorAll(\".btn-amount-modal\");\r\n\r\n    closeBtn?.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.close());\r\n    cancelBtn?.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.close());\r\n    applyBtn?.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.apply());\r\n\r\n    // Search with debounce\r\n    let searchTimer = null;\r\n    searchField?.addEventListener(\"input\", (e) => {\r\n      clearTimeout(searchTimer);\r\n      searchTimer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n        this.renderTags(e.target.value);\r\n      }, 150);\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Amount buttons\r\n    amountButtons.forEach(btn => {\r\n      btn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\r\n        document.querySelectorAll(\".btn-amount-modal\").forEach(b => b.classList.remove(\"selected\"));\r\n        btn.classList.add(\"selected\");\r\n        this.selectedAmount = Number(btn.dataset.amount || 0);\r\n        customAmountInput.value = \"\";\r\n      });\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Custom amount input\r\n    customAmountInput?.addEventListener(\"input\", (e) => {\r\n      document.querySelectorAll(\".btn-amount-modal\").forEach(b => b.classList.remove(\"selected\"));\r\n      this.selectedAmount = Number(e.target.value || 0);\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Notes input\r\n    notesInput?.addEventListener(\"input\", (e) => {\r\n      this.selectedNotes = String(e.target.value || \"\").trim();\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Modal backdrop click to close\r\n    const scrim = this.modal.querySelector(\".tag-modal-scrim\");\r\n    scrim?.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.close());\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async open(houseId) {\r\n    this.selectedHouseId = houseId;\r\n    this.selectedTags = [];\r\n    this.selectedAmount = 0;\r\n    this.selectedNotes = \"\";\r\n\r\n    // Update house name\r\n    const house = houses.find(h => h.id === houseId);\r\n    const houseName = document.getElementById(\"tagModalHouseName\");\r\n    if (houseName && house) houseName.textContent = house.name;\r\n\r\n    // Reset form\r\n    const searchField = document.getElementById(\"tagSearchField\");\r\n    const customAmount = document.getElementById(\"modalCustomAmount\");\r\n    const notesInput = document.getElementById(\"modalNotesInput\");\r\n    const saveCheckbox = document.getElementById(\"saveCustomTagCheckbox\");\r\n\r\n    if (searchField) searchField.value = \"\";\r\n    if (customAmount) customAmount.value = \"\";\r\n    if (notesInput) notesInput.value = \"\";\r\n    if (saveCheckbox) saveCheckbox.checked = false;\r\n\r\n    document.querySelectorAll(\".btn-amount-modal\").forEach(b => b.classList.remove(\"selected\"));\r\n    this.renderSelectedChips();\r\n\r\n    // Render initial tags\r\n    this.renderTags(\"\");\r\n\r\n    // Focus search field\r\n    setTimeout(() => searchField?.focus(), 150);\r\n\r\n    // Show modal\r\n    if (this.modal) this.modal.hidden = false;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  close() {\r\n    if (this.modal) this.modal.hidden = true;\r\n    this.selectedTags = [];\r\n    this.selectedAmount = 0;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  renderTags(searchQuery) {\r\n    const grouped = this.tagLibrary.getGroupedTags(searchQuery);\r\n    const container = document.getElementById(\"tagCategoryGroups\");\r\n    if (!container) return;\r\n\r\n    container.innerHTML = \"\";\r\n\r\n    Object.entries(grouped).sort().forEach(([category, tags]) => {\r\n      const groupDiv = document.createElement(\"div\");\r\n      groupDiv.className = \"tag-category-group\";\r\n\r\n      const label = document.createElement(\"div\");\r\n      label.className = \"tag-category-label\";\r\n"}}

totalByHouse.blue += Number(changes.blue || 0);\r\n    totalByHouse.silver += Number(changes.silver || 0);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  dom.reasonTracker.innerHTML = houses.map(house => {\r\n    const value = }).join(\"\");\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderPasswordResetRequests() {\r\n  if (!dom.resetRequestList) return;\r\n  const openRequests = passwordResetRequests\r\n    .filter(request => });\r\n}\r\n\r\nlet simplifiedScoreAmount = 0;\r\n\r\nfunction renderSimplifiedReasonCombo() {\r\n  const input = document.getElementById(\"reasonComboInput\");\r\n  const datalist = ).join(\"\");\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderSimplifiedCatalog() {\r\n  const select = document.getElementById(\"classificationSelect\");\r\n  if (!select || !eventCatalog) return;\r\n\r\n event.subevents.forEach(subevent => {\r\n        const option = document.createElement(\"option\");\r\n        option.value = `${category.id}|${event.id}|${subevent.id}`;\r\n        option.textContent = `${category.name} â€¢ ${event.name} â€¢ ${subevent.name}`;\r\n        select.appendChild(option);\r\n      });\r\n    });\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction buildSimplifiedContext() {\r\n  const const reason = String(reasonInput.value || \"\").trim();\r\n  const classification = String(classSelect.value || \"\").trim();\r\n  const amount = simplifiedScoreAmount || 0;\r\n\r\n  if (!reason || !classification || !amount) return null;\r\n\r\n  const [catId, evId, subId] = classification.split(\"|\");\r\n  const category = getCategoryById(catId);\r\n  const event = getEventById(category, evId);\r\n  const subevent = getSubeventById(event, subId);\r\n\r\n  if (!category || !event || !subevent) return null;\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    categoryId: category.id,\r\n    categoryName: category.name,\r\n    eventId: event.id,\r\n    eventName: event.name,\r\n    subeventId: subevent.id,\r\n    subeventName: subevent.name,\r\n    reason,\r\n    amount,\r\n    pathLabel: `${category.name} > ${event.name} > ${subevent.name}`\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction attachSimplifiedFormListeners() {\r\n  document.getElementById(\"reasonComboInput\")?.addEventListener(\"input\", () => {\r\n    renderSimplifiedReasonCombo();\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  document.getElementById(\"classificationSelect\")?.addEventListener(\"change\", () => {\r\n    renderSimplifiedReasonCombo();\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  document.querySelectorAll(\".btn-amount\").forEach(btn => {\r\n    btn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\r\n      document.querySelectorAll(\".btn-amount\").forEach(b => b.classList.remove(\"selected\"));\r\n      btn.classList.add(\"selected\");\r\n      simplifiedScoreAmount = Number(btn.dataset.amount || 0);\r\n      const customInput = document.getElementById(\"customAmountInput\");\r\n      if (customInput) customInput.value = \"\";\r\n    });\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  document.getElementById(\"customAmountInput\")?.addEventListener(\"input\", (e) => {\r\n    document.querySelectorAll(\".btn-amount\").forEach(b => b.classList.remove(\"selected\"));\r\n    simplifiedScoreAmount = Number(e.target.value || 0);\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n","exit_code":0,"duration":{"secs":0,"nanos":982036300},"formatted_output":"","status":"completed"}}

=> {\r\n    btn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\r\n      document.querySelectorAll(\".btn-amount\").forEach(b => b.classList.remove(\"selected\"));\r\n      btn.classList.add(\"selected\");\r\n      simplifiedScoreAmount = Number(btn.dataset.amount || 0);\r\n      const customInput = document.getElementById(\"customAmountInput\");\r\n      if (customInput) customInput.value = \"\";\r\n    });\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  document.getElementById(\"customAmountInput\")?.addEventListener(\"input\", (e) => {\r\n    document.querySelectorAll(\".btn-amount\").forEach(b => b.classList.remove(\"selected\"));\r\n    simplifiedScoreAmount = Number(e.target.value || 0);\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:20:12.965Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_GXUkZplmzaAUp7N2ryAVmrLO","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1 seconds\nOutput:\n    updateBusyState(-1);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ============ REASON TRACKER ============\r\n\r\nfunction renderReasonTracker() {\r\n  const totalByHouse = { red: 0, white: 0, blue: 0, silver: 0 };\r\n  const sinceMs = Date.now() - (2 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\r\n  const relevant = auditEntries.filter(entry => {\r\n    if (!activeContext) return false;\r\n    if (!entry?.context) return false;\r\n    if (entry.context.categoryId !== activeContext.categoryId) return false;\r\n    if (entry.context.eventId !== activeContext.eventId) return false;\r\n    if (entry.context.subeventId !== activeContext.subeventId) return false;\r\n    return Number(entry.createdAtMs || 0) >= sinceMs;\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  relevant.forEach(entry => {\r\n    const changes = entry.changes || {};\r\n    totalByHouse.red += Number(changes.red || 0);\r\n    totalByHouse.white += Number(changes.white || 0);\r\n    totalByHouse.blue += Number(changes.blue || 0);\r\n    totalByHouse.silver += Number(changes.silver || 0);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  dom.reasonTracker.innerHTML = houses.map(house => {\r\n    const value = Number(totalByHouse[house.id] || 0);\r\n    const polarityClass = value > 0 ? \"delta-pos\" : (value < 0 ? \"delta-neg\" : \"\");\r\n    const signed = `${value > 0 ? \"+\" : \"\"}${value}`;\r\n    return `<span class=\"history-delta-chip ${polarityClass}\">${house.id[0].toUpperCase()} ${signed}</span>`;\r\n  }).join(\"\");\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderCatalogSelects() {\r\n  // Safety check: only render if elements exist\r\n  if (!dom.categorySelect || !dom.eventSelect || !dom.subeventSelect) {\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const selectedCategory = dom.categorySelect.value;\r\n  dom.categorySelect.innerHTML = \"\";\r\n  eventCatalog.categories.forEach(category => {\r\n    const option = document.createElement(\"option\");\r\n    option.value = category.id;\r\n    option.textContent = category.name;\r\n    dom.categorySelect.appendChild(option);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  if (selectedCategory && eventCatalog.categories.some(category => category.id === selectedCategory)) {\r\n    dom.categorySelect.value = selectedCategory;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const category = getCategoryById(dom.categorySelect.value) || eventCatalog.categories[0] || null;\r\n  dom.eventSelect.innerHTML = \"\";\r\n  if (category) {\r\n    category.events.forEach(event => {\r\n      const option = document.createElement(\"option\");\r\n      option.value = event.id;\r\n      option.textContent = event.name;\r\n      dom.eventSelect.appendChild(option);\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const event = getEventById(category, dom.eventSelect.value) || category?.events?.[0] || null;\r\n  dom.subeventSelect.innerHTML = \"\";\r\n  if (event) {\r\n    event.subevents.forEach(subevent => {\r\n      const option = document.createElement(\"option\");\r\n      option.value = subevent.id;\r\n      option.textContent = subevent.name;\r\n      dom.subeventSelect.appendChild(option);\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  syncContextModeUi();\r\n  renderReasonTemplateOptions();\r\n  renderUsedReasonSelect();\r\n  renderRecentReasonChips();\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction syncContextModeUi() {\r\n  if (!dom.eventModeSelect || !dom.sessionInput || !dom.seasonInput) {\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  const sessionMode = dom.eventModeSelect.value === \"session\";\r\n  dom.sessionInput.disabled = !sessionMode;\r\n  if (!sessionMode) {\r\n    dom.sessionInput.value = \"\";\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction reasonTemplateSuggestions(route) {\r\n  if (!route) return REASON_TEMPLATE_BANK;\r\n  const eventWords = [route.eventName, route.subeventName]\r\n    .map(item => String(item || \"\").trim())\r\n    .filter(Boolean);\r\n  const dynamic = eventWords.map(word => `${word} Participation`);\r\n  return [...REASON_TEMPLATE_BANK, ...dynamic];\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderReasonTemplateOptions() {\r\n  if (!dom.reasonTemplateSelect) return;\r\n  const route = selectedRoute();\r\n  const options = reasonTemplateSuggestions(route);\r\n  const previous = String(dom.reasonTemplateSelect.value || \"\");\r\n  dom.reasonTemplateSelect.innerHTML = '<option value=\"\">Quick reason template</option>';\r\n  options.forEach(optionText => {\r\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:20:13.009Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_a8msBgvPbRT1DtIxe3kQe0om","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1 seconds\nOutput:\n  }).join(\"\");\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderProposalList() {\r\n  renderProposalListEnhanced();\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderUserList() {\r\n  if (!dom.userList) return;\r\n  const queryText = String(dom.userSearch.value || \"\").trim().toLowerCase();\r\n\r\n  // Deduplicate by email (unique identifier)\r\n  const seen = new Set();\r\n  const deduped = [];\r\n  userProfiles.forEach(profile => {\r\n    const key = profile.email || profile.uid;\r\n    if (!seen.has(key)) {\r\n      seen.add(key);\r\n      deduped.push(profile);\r\n    }\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const filtered = deduped.filter(profile => {\r\n    if (!queryText) return true;\r\n    const haystack = `${profile.name || \"\"} ${profile.email || \"\"} ${profile.role || \"\"}`.toLowerCase();\r\n    return haystack.includes(queryText);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  if (!filtered.length) {\r\n    dom.userList.innerHTML = '<li class=\"log-empty\">No users found.</li>';\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  dom.userList.innerHTML = filtered.map(profile => {\r\n    return `\r\n      <li class=\"user-item\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <strong>${profile.name || \"(No Name)\"}</strong>\r\n          <div class=\"user-meta\">${profile.email || profile.uid} Â· role=${normalizeRole(profile.role)}</div>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div class=\"user-actions\">\r\n          <button class=\"btn btn-outline btn-mini\" type=\"button\" data-user-edit=\"${profile.uid}\">Edit</button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </li>\r\n    `;\r\n  }).join(\"\");\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderPasswordResetRequests() {\r\n  if (!dom.resetRequestList) return;\r\n  const openRequests = passwordResetRequests\r\n    .filter(request => String(request.status || \"open\") !== \"closed\")\r\n    .sort((a, b) => Number(b.createdAtMs || 0) - Number(a.createdAtMs || 0));\r\n\r\n  if (!openRequests.length) {\r\n    dom.resetRequestList.innerHTML = '<li class=\"log-empty\">No open password reset requests.</li>';\r\n"}}

}\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction activeContextOrWarn() {\r\n  // Allow scoring with default/minimal context if none is set\r\n  if (activeContext) return activeContext;\r\n\r\n  // Create a default context that reason: \"Untagged\",\r\n    notes: \"\",\r\n    isDefault: true  // Flag to indicate this is auto-created\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction currentCommitLabel() {\r\n  return String(dom.commitLabel.value || \"\").trim().slice(0, 40);\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction summaryWithLabel(summary) {\r\n  const label = currentCommitLabel();\r\n  return label ? `${summary} Â· {${label}}` : summary;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction buildAppliedAuditEntry({ type, summary, changes = null, context = null, reason = \"\", notes = \"\", eventTag = \"\", beforeScores = null, afterScores = null, extra = {} }) {\r\n  return {\r\n    type,\r\n    status: \"applied\",\r\n    summary,\r\n    changes: changes || { red: 0, white: 0, blue: 0, silver: 0 },\r\n    context,\r\n    reason,\r\n    notes,\r\n    eventTag: eventTag || \"\",  // Optional event tag for organization\r\n    eventTagNormalized: normalizeTag(eventTag),  // Normalized for matching\r\n    actorEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n    actorUid: currentUserUid,\r\n    createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n    createdAt: createActionTimestamp(),\r\n    beforeScores,\r\n    afterScores,\r\n    ...extra\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function appendAuditLog(entry) {\r\n  if (TEST_MODE) {\r\n    const id = `local_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\r\n    localState.auditLog.unshift({ ...entry, id, createdAtMs: Date.now() });\r\n    localState.auditLog = localState.auditLog.slice(0, MAX_ACTIVITY_ENTRIES);\r\n    localWriteState(localState);\r\n    auditEntries = localState.auditLog;\r\n    refreshAllUi();\r\n    return id;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const auditRef = doc(collection(scoresDoc, \"auditLog\"));\r\n  await setDoc(auditRef, entry);\r\n  return auditRef.id;\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function applyDirectScoreAction({ type, summary, changes, context, reason, notes, extra = {} }) {\r\n  const labeledSummary = summaryWithLabel(summary);\r\n\r\n  if (TEST_MODE) {\r\n    const before = { ...localState.scores };\r\n    const after = applyChanges(before, changes);\r\n    localState.scores = after;\r\n    localState.lastAction = {\r\n      type,\r\n      summary: labeledSummary,\r\n      actorEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n      timestamp: createActionTimestamp(),\r\n      createdAtMs: Date.now()\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    await appendAuditLog(buildAppliedAuditEntry({\r\n      type,\r\n      summary: labeledSummary,\r\n      changes,\r\n      context,\r\n      reason,\r\n      notes,\r\n      beforeScores: before,\r\n      afterScores: after,\r\n      extra\r\n    }));\r\n\r\n    localWriteState(localState);\r\n    updateFromScoresDoc({ ...localState.scores, eventCatalog: localState.eventCatalog, lastAction: localState.lastAction });\r\n    return { applied: true };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return runTransaction(db, async transaction => {\r\n    const snapshot = await transaction.get(scoresDoc);\r\n    const data = snapshot.exists() ? snapshot.data() : {};\r\n    const before = scoresFromDoc(data);\r\n    const after = applyChanges(before, changes);\r\n    const auditRef = doc(collection(scoresDoc, \"auditLog\"));\r\n\r\n    transaction.set(scoresDoc, {\r\n      ...after,\r\n      lastAction: {\r\n        type,\r\n        summary: labeledSummary,\r\n        actorEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n        actorUid: currentUserUid,\r\n        timestamp: serverTimestamp(),\r\n        createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n        context,\r\n        changes\r\n      }\r\n    }, { merge: true });\r\n\r\n    transaction.set(auditRef, buildAppliedAuditEntry({\r\n      type,\r\n      summary: labeledSummary,\r\n      changes,\r\n      context,\r\n      reason,\r\n      notes,\r\n      beforeScores: before,\r\n      afterScores: after,\r\n      extra\r\n    }));\r\n\r\n    return { applied: true };\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function submitProposal({ actionType, summary, changes = null, context = null, reason = \"\", notes = \"\", eventTag = \"\", pathRequest = null }) {\r\n  const proposal = {\r\n    actionType,\r\n    status: \"pending\",\r\n    summary: summaryWithLabel(summary),\r\n    changes: changes || { red: 0, white: 0, blue: 0, silver: 0 },\r\n    context,\r\n    reason,\r\n    notes,\r\n    eventTag: eventTag || \"\",\r\n    pathRequest,\r\n    createdByUid: currentUserUid,\r\n    createdByEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n    createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n    createdAt: createActionTimestamp(),\r\n    reviewedByUid: null,\r\n    reviewedByEmail: null,\r\n    reviewedAtMs: null,\r\n    reviewedAt: null\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  if (TEST_MODE) {\r\n    const id = `proposal_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\r\n    localState.pendingProposals.unshift({ ...proposal, id });\r\n    localState.pendingProposals = localState.pendingProposals.slice(0, 200);\r\n    localWriteState(localState);\r\n    pendingProposals = localState.pendingProposals;\r\n    await appendAuditLog({\r\n      type: actionType === \"path_request\" ? \"path_request_submitted\" : \"proposal_submitted\",\r\n      status: \"applied\",\r\n      summary: proposal.summary,\r\n      changes: proposal.changes,\r\n      context: proposal.context,\r\n      reason: proposal.reason,\r\n      notes: proposal.notes,\r\n      actorEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n      actorUid: currentUserUid,\r\n      createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n      createdAt: createActionTimestamp(),\r\n      proposalId: id\r\n    });\r\n    refreshAllUi();\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const proposalRef = doc(collection(scoresDoc, \"pendingProposals\"));\r\n  await setDoc(proposalRef, proposal);\r\n\r\n  await appendAuditLog({\r\n    type: actionType === \"path_request\" ? \"path_request_submitted\" : \"proposal_submitted\",\r\n    status: \"applied\",\r\n    summary: proposal.summary,\r\n    changes: proposal.changes,\r\n    context: proposal.context,\r\n    reason: proposal.reason,\r\n    notes: proposal.notes,\r\n    actorEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n    actorUid: currentUserUid,\r\n    createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n    createdAt: createActionTimestamp(),\r\n    proposalId: proposalRef.id\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function submitScoringAction({ type, summary, changes }) {\r\n  const context = activeContextOrWarn();\r\n  if (!context) return;\r\n\r\n  const reason = context.reason;\r\n  const notes = context.notes;\r\n  const selectedTags = getSelectedTags();\r\n  const eventTag = selectedTags.length > 0 ? selectedTags[0] : \"\";  // Use first selected tag\r\n\r\n  if (can(\"scoreEdit\")) {\r\n    const write = await withWrite(() => applyDirectScoreAction({\r\n      type, summary, changes, context, reason, notes,\r\n      extra: { eventTag }\r\n    }));\r\n    if (write.ok && write.value?.applied) {\r\n      showToast(\"Score applied.\", \"success\");\r\n    }\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (can(\"proposePoints\")) {\r\n    const write = await withWrite(() => submitProposal({\r\n      actionType: \"score_change\",\r\n      summary,\r\n      changes,\r\n      context,\r\n      reason,\r\n      notes,\r\n      eventTag\r\n    }));\r\n    if (write.ok) showToast(\"Suggestion submitted for admin review.\", \"info\");\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  showToast(\"Your role cannot score or suggest points.\", \"warn\");\r\n","exit_code":0,"duration":{"secs":1,"nanos":661139500},"formatted_output":"","status":"completed"}}

type,\r\n        summary: labeledSummary,\r\n        actorEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n        actorUid: currentUserUid,\r\n        timestamp: serverTimestamp(),\r\n        createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n        context,\r\n        changes\r\n      }\r\n    }, { merge: true });\r\n\r\n    transaction.set(auditRef, buildAppliedAuditEntry({\r\n      type,\r\n      summary: labeledSummary,\r\n      changes,\r\n      context,\r\n      reason,\r\n      notes,\r\n      beforeScores: before,\r\n      afterScores: after,\r\n      extra\r\n    }));\r\n\r\n    return { applied: true };\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function submitProposal({ actionType, summary, changes = null, context = null, reason = \"\", notes = \"\", eventTag = \"\", pathRequest = null }) {\r\n  const proposal = {\r\n    actionType,\r\n    status: \"pending\",\r\n    summary: summaryWithLabel(summary),\r\n    changes: changes || { red: 0, white: 0, blue: 0, silver: 0 },\r\n    context,\r\n    reason,\r\n    notes,\r\n    eventTag: eventTag || \"\",\r\n    pathRequest,\r\n    createdByUid: currentUserUid,\r\n    createdByEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n    createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n    createdAt: createActionTimestamp(),\r\n    reviewedByUid: null,\r\n    reviewedByEmail: null,\r\n    reviewedAtMs: null,\r\n    reviewedAt: null\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  if (TEST_MODE) {\r\n    const id = `proposal_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\r\n    localState.pendingProposals.unshift({ ...proposal, id });\r\n    localState.pendingProposals = localState.pendingProposals.slice(0, 200);\r\n    localWriteState(localState);\r\n    pendingProposals = localState.pendingProposals;\r\n    await appendAuditLog({\r\n      type: actionType === \"path_request\" ? \"path_request_submitted\" : \"proposal_submitted\",\r\n      status: \"applied\",\r\n      summary: proposal.summary,\r\n      changes: proposal.changes,\r\n      context: proposal.context,\r\n      reason: proposal.reason,\r\n      notes: proposal.notes,\r\n      actorEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n      actorUid: currentUserUid,\r\n      createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n      createdAt: createActionTimestamp(),\r\n      proposalId: id\r\n    });\r\n    refreshAllUi();\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const proposalRef = doc(collection(scoresDoc, \"pendingProposals\"));\r\n  await setDoc(proposalRef, proposal);\r\n\r\n  await appendAuditLog({\r\n    type: actionType === \"path_request\" ? \"path_request_submitted\" : \"proposal_submitted\",\r\n    status: \"applied\",\r\n    summary: proposal.summary,\r\n    changes: proposal.changes,\r\n    context: proposal.context,\r\n    reason: proposal.reason,\r\n    notes: proposal.notes,\r\n    actorEmail: currentUserEmail,\r\n    actorUid: currentUserUid,\r\n    createdAtMs: Date.now(),\r\n    createdAt: createActionTimestamp(),\r\n    proposalId: proposalRef.id\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function submitScoringAction({ type, summary, changes }) {\r\n  const context = activeContextOrWarn();\r\n  if (!context) return;\r\n\r\n  const reason = context.reason;\r\n  const notes = context.notes;\r\n  const selectedTags = getSelectedTags();\r\n  const eventTag = selectedTags.length > 0 ? selectedTags[0] : \"\";  // Use first selected tag\r\n\r\n  if (can(\"scoreEdit\")) {\r\n    const write = await withWrite(() => applyDirectScoreAction({\r\n      type, summary, changes, context, reason, notes,\r\n      extra: { eventTag }\r\n    }));\r\n    if (write.ok && write.value?.applied) {\r\n      showToast(\"Score applied.\", \"success\");\r\n    }\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (can(\"proposePoints\")) {\r\n    const write = await withWrite(() => submitProposal({\r\n      actionType: \"score_change\",\r\n      summary,\r\n      changes,\r\n      context,\r\n      reason,\r\n      notes,\r\n      eventTag\r\n    }));\r\n    if (write.ok) showToast(\"Suggestion submitted for admin review.\", \"info\");\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  showToast(\"Your role cannot score or suggest points.\", \"warn\");\r\n"}}

\"+\" : \"\"}${delta}`;\r\n  await submitScoringAction({ type: \"delta\", summary, changes: changesFromHouseDelta(house, delta) });\r\n}\r\n","exit_code":0,"duration":{"secs":0,"nanos":884209700},"formatted_output":"","status":"completed"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:20:40.121Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"exec_command_end","call_id":"call_iYZrszebIyglUtyfnx3binlP","turn_id":"019ddc9d-4eb8-7a83-bb66-ca294def9ecf","command":["C:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe","-Command","Get-Content control.html | Select-Object -Index (4838..4888)"],"cwd":"c:\\Repositories\\ALA-house-leaderboard","parsed_cmd":[{"type":"unknown","cmd":"Get-Content control.html | Select-Object -Index (4838..4888)"}],"source":"agent","stdout":"","stderr":"","aggregated_output":" * Also considers usage count (more used = higher rank)\r\n */\r\nfunction findMatchingTags(input, tags, options = {}) {\r\n  const { maxResults = 5, minScore = 40, maxDistance = 3 } = options;\r\n\r\n  if (!input || input.trim().length === 0) {\r\n    // Return top used tags if no input\r\n    return tags\r\n      .sort((a, b) => (b.usage?.count || 0) - (a.usage?.count || 0))\r\n      .slice(0, maxResults);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const matches = tags\r\n    .map((tag) => ({\r\n      ...tag,\r\n      score: fuzzyMatchScore(input, tag.name, maxDistance),\r\n      usageBoost: Math.min((tag.usage?.count || 0) * 2, 10), // Max 10 point boost\r\n    }))\r\n    .filter((m) => m.score + m.usageBoost >= minScore)\r\n    .sort((a, b) => {\r\n      const scoreA = a.score + a.usageBoost;\r\n      const scoreB = b.score + b.usageBoost;\r\n      return scoreB - scoreA; // Higher score first\r\n    })\r\n    .slice(0, maxResults);\r\n\r\n  return matches;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Check if new tag is too similar to existing ones\r\n * Returns { isDuplicate: boolean, similar: Tag | null }\r\n */\r\nfunction checkDuplicateTag(newTagName, existingTags, threshold = 80) {\r\n  const normalizedNew = normalizeTag(newTagName);\r\n\r\n  for (const tag of existingTags) {\r\n    const score = fuzzyMatchScore(newTagName, tag.name, 5);\r\n    const normalizedMatch = normalizeTag(tag.name);\r\n\r\n    // Check both score and exact normalized match\r\n    if (score >= threshold || normalizedNew === normalizedMatch) {\r\n      return {\r\n        isDuplicate: true,\r\n        similar: tag,\r\n        confidence: score,\r\n      };\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return { isDuplicate: false, similar: null };\r\n","exit_code":0,"duration":{"secs":0,"nanos":360864300},"formatted_output":"","status":"completed"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:20:40.124Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_iYZrszebIyglUtyfnx3binlP","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.4 seconds\nOutput:\n * Also considers usage count (more used = higher rank)\r\n */\r\nfunction findMatchingTags(input, tags, options = {}) {\r\n  const { maxResults = 5, minScore = 40, maxDistance = 3 } = options;\r\n\r\n  if (!input || input.trim().length === 0) {\r\n    // Return top used tags if no input\r\n    return tags\r\n      .sort((a, b) => (b.usage?.count || 0) - (a.usage?.count || 0))\r\n      .slice(0, maxResults);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const matches = tags\r\n    .map((tag) => ({\r\n      ...tag,\r\n      score: fuzzyMatchScore(input, tag.name, maxDistance),\r\n      usageBoost: Math.min((tag.usage?.count || 0) * 2, 10), // Max 10 point boost\r\n    }))\r\n    .filter((m) => m.score + m.usageBoost >= minScore)\r\n    .sort((a, b) => {\r\n      const scoreA = a.score + a.usageBoost;\r\n      const scoreB = b.score + b.usageBoost;\r\n      return scoreB - scoreA; // Higher score first\r\n    })\r\n    .slice(0, maxResults);\r\n\r\n  return matches;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Check if new tag is too similar to existing ones\r\n * Returns { isDuplicate: boolean, similar: Tag | null }\r\n */\r\nfunction checkDuplicateTag(newTagName, existingTags, threshold = 80) {\r\n  const normalizedNew = normalizeTag(newTagName);\r\n\r\n  for (const tag of existingTags) {\r\n    const score = fuzzyMatchScore(newTagName, tag.name, 5);\r\n    const normalizedMatch = normalizeTag(tag.name);\r\n\r\n    // Check both score and exact normalized match\r\n    if (score >= threshold || normalizedNew === normalizedMatch) {\r\n      return {\r\n        isDuplicate: true,\r\n        similar: tag,\r\n        confidence: score,\r\n      };\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return { isDuplicate: false, similar: null };\r\n"}}

bottom: 20px; right: 20px; z-index: 9999; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;\"></div>\r\n\r\n  <script src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.js\"></script>\r\n<script>\r\n/**\r\n * Tag Utilities: Fuzzy matching, normalization, suggestion engine\r\n *\r\n * Handles:\r\n * - Normalizing tag names for comparison (lowercase, remove punctuation/spaces)\r\n * - Fuzzy matching despite typos, capitalization, spacing\r\n * - Ranking suggestions by similarity + usage\r\n * - Preventing duplicate tags with different spellings\r\n */\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Normalize tag for comparison: lowercase, remove special chars, collapse spaces\r\n * Example: \"Girls Varsity Basketball\" â†’ \"girlsvaritybasketball\"\r\n */\r\n/**\r\n * Calculate fuzzy match score (0-100, higher = better match)\r\n * Considers: normalized string similarity, partial match, prefix match\r\n */\r\nfunction fuzzyMatchScore(input, tagName, maxDistance = 3) {\r\n  const normalizedInput = normalizeTag(input);\r\n  const normalizedTag = normalizeTag(tagName);\r\n\r\n  // Exact match\r\n  if (normalizedInput === normalizedTag) return 100;\r\n\r\n  // Prefix match (e.g., \"bask\" matches \"basketball\")\r\n  if (normalizedTag.startsWith(normalizedInput)) {\r\n    return 90 - (normalizedInput.length - normalizedTag.length) * 2;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // Levenshtein distance\r\n  const distance = levenshteinDistance(normalizedInput, normalizedTag);\r\n  if (distance > maxDistance) return 0;\r\n\r\n  // Score based on distance: max distance = 20 points\r\n  return Math.max(0, 70 - distance * 10);\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Find tags matching input query from a list\r\n * Returns sorted array by match score (best matches first)\r\n * Also considers usage count (more used = higher rank)\r\n","exit_code":0,"duration":{"secs":0,"nanos":563748300},"formatted_output":"","status":"completed"}}

bottom: 20px; right: 20px; z-index: 9999; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;\"></div>\r\n\r\n  <script src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.js\"></script>\r\n<script>\r\n/**\r\n * Tag Utilities: Fuzzy matching, normalization, suggestion engine\r\n *\r\n * Handles:\r\n * - Normalizing tag names for comparison (lowercase, remove punctuation/spaces)\r\n * - Fuzzy matching despite typos, capitalization, spacing\r\n * - Ranking suggestions by similarity + usage\r\n * - Preventing duplicate tags with different spellings\r\n */\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Normalize tag for comparison: lowercase, remove special chars, collapse spaces\r\n * Example: \"Girls Varsity Basketball\" â†’ \"girlsvaritybasketball\"\r\n */\r\n/**\r\n * Calculate fuzzy match score (0-100, higher = better match)\r\n * Considers: normalized string similarity, partial match, prefix match\r\n */\r\nfunction fuzzyMatchScore(input, tagName, maxDistance = 3) {\r\n  const normalizedInput = normalizeTag(input);\r\n  const normalizedTag = normalizeTag(tagName);\r\n\r\n  // Exact match\r\n  if (normalizedInput === normalizedTag) return 100;\r\n\r\n  // Prefix match (e.g., \"bask\" matches \"basketball\")\r\n  if (normalizedTag.startsWith(normalizedInput)) {\r\n    return 90 - (normalizedInput.length - normalizedTag.length) * 2;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // Levenshtein distance\r\n  const distance = levenshteinDistance(normalizedInput, normalizedTag);\r\n  if (distance > maxDistance) return 0;\r\n\r\n  // Score based on distance: max distance = 20 points\r\n  return Math.max(0, 70 - distance * 10);\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Find tags matching input query from a list\r\n * Returns sorted array by match score (best matches first)\r\n * Also considers usage count (more used = higher rank)\r\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:21:29.316Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_ofXW6HPwjMZKIsTYtL460WdF","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: control.html\n@@\n let simplifiedScoreAmount = 0;\n+\n+const SMART_REASON_KEYWORDS = {\n+  party: [\"dance\", \"celebration\", \"social\", \"festival\", \"spirit\"],\n+  event: [\"assembly\", \"party\", \"celebration\", \"competition\", \"activity\"],\n+  assembly: [\"event\", \"pep rally\", \"school assembly\", \"back to school\"],\n+  game: [\"sports\", \"competition\", \"match\", \"tournament\"],\n+  help: [\"service\", \"volunteer\", \"kindness\", \"cleanup\"],\n+  clean: [\"service\", \"cleanup\", \"help\"],\n+  lunch: [\"cafeteria\", \"service\", \"help\"],\n+  spirit: [\"assembly\", \"pep rally\", \"party\"],\n+  back: [\"back to school\", \"assembly\", \"orientation\"]\n+};\n+\n+function reasonSearchTerms(input) {\n+  const words = String(input || \"\")\n+    .toLowerCase()\n+    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\\s]/g, \" \")\n+    .split(/\\s+/)\n+    .filter(Boolean);\n+  const expanded = new Set(words);\n+  words.forEach(word => {\n+    (SMART_REASON_KEYWORDS[word] || []).forEach(term => expanded.add(term));\n+  });\n+  return [...expanded];\n+}\n+\n+function flattenCatalogMatches() {\n+  const rows = [];\n+  eventCatalog.categories.forEach(category => {\n+    category.events.forEach(event => {\n+      event.subevents.forEach(subevent => {\n+        const label = `${category.name} ${event.name} ${subevent.name}`;\n+        rows.push({\n+          value: `${category.id}|${event.id}|${subevent.id}`,\n+          label: `${category.name} • ${event.name} • ${subevent.name}`,\n+          search: label,\n+          category,\n+          event,\n+          subevent\n+        });\n+      });\n+    });\n+  });\n+  return rows;\n+}\n+\n+function smartCatalogMatches(input, maxResults = 6) {\n+  const reason = String(input || \"\").trim();\n+  const terms = reasonSearchTerms(reason);\n+  const rows = flattenCatalogMatches();\n+\n+  if (!reason && !terms.length) return rows.slice(0, maxResults).map(row => ({ ...row, score: 1 }));\n+\n+  return rows\n+    .map(row => {\n+      const direct = fuzzyMatchScore(reason, row.search, 8);\n+      const keyword = terms.reduce((score, term) => {\n+        const haystack = row.search.toLowerCase();\n+        if (haystack.includes(term)) return score + 28;\n+        return score + Math.max(0, fuzzyMatchScore(term, row.search, 5) * 0.28);\n+      }, 0);\n+      const recentBoost = auditEntries.some(entry => normalizeTag(entry.reason || entry.summary || \"\") === normalizeTag(reason)) ? 8 : 0;\n+      return { ...row, score: direct + keyword + recentBoost };\n+    })\n+    .filter(row => row.score > 0)\n+    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)\n+    .slice(0, maxResults);\n+}\n+\n+function updateSmartReasonMatches() {\n+  const input = document.getElementById(\"reasonComboInput\");\n+  const select = document.getElementById(\"classificationSelect\");\n+  const container = document.getElementById(\"smartReasonMatches\");\n+  if (!input || !select || !container) return;\n+\n+  const matches = smartCatalogMatches(input.value, 6);\n+  if (!select.value && matches[0]) {\n+    select.value = matches[0].value;\n+  }\n+\n+  if (!matches.length) {\n+    container.innerHTML = '<span class=\"muted\">No event match yet. This will still save with your reason.</span>';\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  container.innerHTML = matches.map((match, index) => `\n+    <button class=\"smart-match-chip ${select.value === match.value ? \"is-active\" : \"\"}\" type=\"button\" data-smart-match=\"${match.value}\">\n+      ${index === 0 ? \"Best: \" : \"\"}${match.label} <small>${Math.round(match.score)}</small>\n+    </button>\n+  `).join(\"\");\n+}\n \n function renderSimplifiedReasonCombo() {\n   const input = document.getElementById(\"reasonComboInput\");\n   const datalist = document.getElementById(\"reasonSuggestions\");\n   if (!input || !datalist) return;\n \n   const recent = recentReasonsForRoute(8);\n   const templates = REASON_TEMPLATE_BANK;\n-  const combined = [...new Set([...recent, ...templates])].slice(0, 12);\n+  const smartMatches = smartCatalogMatches(input.value, 5).map(match => {\n+    const typed = String(input.value || \"\").trim();\n+    return typed ? `${typed} - ${match.event.name}` : match.event.name;\n+  });\n+  const keywordSuggestions = reasonSearchTerms(input.value)\n+    .flatMap(term => SMART_REASON_KEYWORDS[term] || [])\n+    .map(term => `${String(input.value || \"\").trim() || term} ${term === \"assembly\" ? \"\" : \"\"}`.trim());\n+  const combined = [...new Set([...smartMatches, ...keywordSuggestions, ...recent, ...templates])].slice(0, 16);\n \n   datalist.innerHTML = combined.map(reason =>\n     `<option value=\"${reason.replace(/\"/g, '&quot;')}\">`\n   ).join(\"\");\n+  updateSmartReasonMatches();\n }\n@@\n function buildSimplifiedContext() \"tournament\"],\n+  help: [\"service\", \"volunteer\", \"kindness\", \"cleanup\"],\n+  clean: [\"service\", \"cleanup\", \"help\"],\n+  lunch: [\"cafeteria\", \"service\", \"help\"],\n+  spirit: [\"assembly\", \"pep rally\", \"party\"],\n+  back: [\"back to school\", \"assembly\", \"orientation\"]\n+};\n+\n+function reasonSearchTerms(input) {\n+  const words = String(input || \"\")\n+    .toLowerCase()\n+    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\\s]/g, \" \")\n+    .split(/\\s+/)\n+    .filter(Boolean);\n+  const expanded = new Set(words);\n+  words.forEach(word => {\n+    (SMART_REASON_KEYWORDS[word] || []).forEach(term => expanded.add(term));\n+  });\n+  return [...expanded];\n+}\n+\n+function flattenCatalogMatches() {\n+  const rows = [];\n+  eventCatalog.categories.forEach(category => {\n+    category.events.forEach(event => {\n+      event.subevents.forEach(subevent => {\n+        const label = `${category.name} ${event.name} ${subevent.name}`;\n+        rows.push({\n+          value: `${category.id}|${event.id}|${subevent.id}`,\n+          label: `${category.name} • ${event.name} • ${subevent.name}`,\n+          search: label,\n+          category,\n+          event,\n+          subevent\n+        });\n+      });\n+    });\n+  });\n+  return rows;\n+}\n+\n+function smartCatalogMatches(input, maxResults = 6) {\n+  const reason = String(input || \"\").trim();\n+  const terms = reasonSearchTerms(reason);\n+  const rows = flattenCatalogMatches();\n+\n+  if (!reason && !terms.length) return rows.slice(0, maxResults).map(row => ({ ...row, score: 1 }));\n+\n+  return rows\n+    .map(row => {\n+      const direct = fuzzyMatchScore(reason, row.search, 8);\n+      const keyword = terms.reduce((score, term) => {\n+        const haystack = row.search.toLowerCase();\n+        if (haystack.includes(term)) return score + 28;\n+        return score + Math.max(0, fuzzyMatchScore(term, row.search, 5) * 0.28);\n+      }, 0);\n+      const recentBoost = auditEntries.some(entry => normalizeTag(entry.reason || entry.summary || \"\") === normalizeTag(reason)) ? 8 : 0;\n+      return { ...row, score: direct + keyword + recentBoost };\n+    })\n+    .filter(row => row.score > 0)\n+    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)\n+    .slice(0, maxResults);\n+}\n+\n+function updateSmartReasonMatches() {\n+  const input = document.getElementById(\"reasonComboInput\");\n+  const select = document.getElementById(\"classificationSelect\");\n+  const container = document.getElementById(\"smartReasonMatches\");\n+  if (!input || !select || !container) return;\n+\n+  const matches = smartCatalogMatches(input.value, 6);\n+  if (!select.value && matches[0]) {\n+    select.value = matches[0].value;\n+  }\n+\n+  if (!matches.length) {\n+    container.innerHTML = '<span class=\"muted\">No event match yet. This will still save with your reason.</span>';\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  container.innerHTML = matches.map((match, index) => `\n+    <button class=\"smart-match-chip ${select.value === match.value ? \"is-active\" : \"\"}\" type=\"button\" data-smart-match=\"${match.value}\">\n+      ${index === 0 ? \"Best: \" : \"\"}${match.label} <small>${Math.round(match.score)}</small>\n+    </button>\n+  `).join(\"\");\n+}\n+\n+function renderSimplifiedReasonCombo() {\n+  const input = document.getElementById(\"reasonComboInput\");\n+  const datalist = keywordSuggestions = reasonSearchTerms(input.value)\n+    .flatMap(term => SMART_REASON_KEYWORDS[term] || [])\n+    .map(term => `${String(input.value || \"\").trim() || term} ${term === \"assembly\" ? \"\" : \"\"}`.trim());\n+  const combined = [...new Set([...smartMatches, ...keywordSuggestions, ...recent, ...templates])].slice(0, 16);\n+\n+  datalist.innerHTML = combined.map(reason =>\n+ {"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:21:46.855Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"exec_command_end","call_id":"call_D8x8FpDL5lUX4kFz56Pon9kU","turn_id":"019ddc9d-4eb8-7a83-bb66-ca294def9ecf","command":["C:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe","-Command","Get-Content control.html | Select-Object -Index (8098..8130)"],"cwd":"c:\\Repositories\\ALA-house-leaderboard","parsed_cmd":[{"type":"unknown","cmd":"Get-Content control.html | Select-Object -Index (8098..8130)"}],"source":"agent","stdout":"","stderr":"","aggregated_output":"  const notes = context.notes;\r\n  const selectedTags = getSelectedTags();\r\n  const eventTag = selectedTags.length > 0 ? selectedTags[0] : \"\";  // Use first selected tag\r\n\r\n  if (can(\"scoreEdit\")) {\r\n    const write = await withWrite(() => applyDirectScoreAction({\r\n      type, summary, changes, context, reason, notes,\r\n      extra: { eventTag }\r\n    }));\r\n    if (write.ok && write.value?.applied) {\r\n      showToast(\"Score applied.\", \"success\");\r\n    }\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (can(\"proposePoints\")) {\r\n    const write = await withWrite(() => submitProposal({\r\n      actionType: \"score_change\",\r\n      summary,\r\n      changes,\r\n      context,\r\n      reason,\r\n      notes,\r\n      eventTag\r\n    }));\r\n    if (write.ok) showToast(\"Suggestion submitted for admin review.\", \"info\");\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  showToast(\"Your role cannot score or suggest points.\", \"warn\");\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function submitScoringActionWithTags({ house, amount, tags, notes }) {\r\n","exit_code":0,"duration":{"secs":0,"nanos":381213300},"formatted_output":"","status":"completed"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:21:46.859Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_D8x8FpDL5lUX4kFz56Pon9kU","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.4 seconds\nOutput:\n  const notes = context.notes;\r\n  const selectedTags = getSelectedTags();\r\n  const eventTag = selectedTags.length > 0 ? selectedTags[0] : \"\";  // Use first selected tag\r\n\r\n  if (can(\"scoreEdit\")) {\r\n    const write = await withWrite(() => applyDirectScoreAction({\r\n      type, summary, changes, context, reason, notes,\r\n      extra: { eventTag }\r\n    }));\r\n    if (write.ok && write.value?.applied) {\r\n      showToast(\"Score applied.\", \"success\");\r\n    }\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (can(\"proposePoints\")) {\r\n    const write = await withWrite(() => submitProposal({\r\n      actionType: \"score_change\",\r\n      summary,\r\n      changes,\r\n      context,\r\n      reason,\r\n      notes,\r\n      eventTag\r\n    }));\r\n    if (write.ok) showToast(\"Suggestion submitted for admin review.\", \"info\");\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  showToast(\"Your role cannot score or suggest points.\", \"warn\");\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function submitScoringActionWithTags({ house, amount, tags, notes }) {\r\n"}}

It becomes the temporary password only for a newly-created Auth user.\";\n+    }\n     const copied = await copyTextToClipboard(password);\n     setUserAdminStatus(copied\n       ? \"Generated password filled and copied. Use it when creating a new Auth user.\"\n       : \"Generated password filled. Select it to copy manually.\");\n   });\n+\n+  dom.copyUserPasswordBtn?.addEventListener(\"click\", async () => {\n+    const password = String(dom.userPasswordInput?.value || dom.generatedPasswordInput?.value || \"\").trim();\n+    if (!password) {\n+      setUserAdminStatus(\"No generated/new password to copy. Existing Firebase Auth passwords cannot be viewed.\");\n+      return;\n+    }\n+    const copied = await copyTextToClipboard(password);\n+    setUserAdminStatus(copied ? \"New password copied.\" : \"Select the new password and copy it manually.\");\n+  });\n*** End Patch\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:22:48.781Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"Fixed the screenshot issues and built out the smarter scoring/password behavior.\n\nWhat changed:\n- Removed the sticky header/menu behavior that was overlapping the scoring form.\n- Hid the fake “hidden” compatibility controls that were rendering as thin lines.\n- Simplified scoring around one reason box.\n- Added fuzzy/keyword event matching chips under the reason box. Typing things like `Back to School Assembly`, `party`, `event`, `spirit`, etc. now suggests/matches catalog paths automatically.\n- Scoring now auto-builds the context from that reason and matched event, so users do not have to manually manage category/event dropdowns.\n- Added a current-password status field in user management.\n- Added copy support for generated/new temporary passwords.\n\nImportant security reality: Firebase Auth does not allow any app/admin UI to view a user’s existing password. So the UI now says that clearly. You can see/copy a generated or newly-created temporary password during that session, and existing users should use reset links.\n\nSynced:\n- [control.html](/c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/control.html)\n- [iPhone Sideload App/control1.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/control1.html>)\n- [iPhone Sideload App/www/index.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/www/index.html>)\n\nVerified:\n- `npm.cmd run check`\n- embedded module syntax for all dashboard HTML files\n- classic and iPhone files match\n- local `control.html` returns `200` at `http://127.0.0.1:5173/control.html`","phase":"final_answer","memory_citation":null}}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:22:48.782Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"Fixed the screenshot issues and built out the smarter scoring/password behavior.\n\nWhat changed:\n- Removed the sticky header/menu behavior that was overlapping the scoring form.\n- Hid the fake “hidden” compatibility controls that were rendering as thin lines.\n- Simplified scoring around one reason box.\n- Added fuzzy/keyword event matching chips under the reason box. Typing things like `Back to School Assembly`, `party`, `event`, `spirit`, etc. now suggests/matches catalog paths automatically.\n- Scoring now auto-builds the context from that reason and matched event, so users do not have to manually manage category/event dropdowns.\n- Added a current-password status field in user management.\n- Added copy support for generated/new temporary passwords.\n\nImportant security reality: Firebase Auth does not allow any app/admin UI to view a user’s existing password. So the UI now says that clearly. You can see/copy a generated or newly-created temporary password during that session, and existing users should use reset links.\n\nSynced:\n- [control.html](/c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/control.html)\n- [iPhone Sideload App/control1.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/control1.html>)\n- [iPhone Sideload App/www/index.html](</c:/Repositories/ALA-house-leaderboard/iPhone Sideload App/www/index.html>)\n\nVerified:\n- `npm.cmd run check`\n- embedded module syntax for all dashboard HTML files\n- classic and iPhone files match\n- local `control.html` returns `200` at `http://127.0.0.1:5173/control.html`"}],"phase":"final_answer"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-30T04:26:24.562Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"message","role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"# Context from my IDE setup:\n\n## Active file: firestore.indexes.json\n\n## Open tabs:\n- firestore.indexes.json: firestore.indexes.json\n- XCODE-ALTSTORE-CHECKLIST.md: iPhone Sideload App/XCODE-ALTSTORE-CHECKLIST.md\n- SETUP.md: SETUP.md\n- points-import-template.csv: templates/points-import-template.csv\n- student-roster-template.csv: templates/student-roster-template.csv\n\n## My request for Codex:\nsearching/managing tags makes no sense. make it all one tag. they match together when searhcing to avoid duplicates and when searhcing back cna keyword match. move certain event pieces to a panel that allows a reason to be entered and an entire event can have points done and then save them to add to full stuff. auto save. build out. don't use my ideas as law but take them as a cretive idea and build on them. \n"}]}}
